I was completely satisfied by the magnificent work Mr. Gravel and his assistant Ana did.

They  practically held my hand from the beginning to the end. I must have called them one to many times with my many questions, concerns and confusions and every call was always handled with excellent care. The attention to detail was just perfect and the fact that they were always very patient and thorough during the whole bankruptcy process was very important for me and it truly felt genuine.

When Mr. Gravel called me to tell me to check my bank accounts, I was flabbergasted..I was the happiest woman in the world when I saw all my money back in my bank accounts, those ZEROS(0000) turned into numbers($$$$), AMEN!

The whole bankruptcy process took a little over a month and it took a little over three weeks to get all of my money back.

If anyone knows what a bank Levy is, knows that it's someone's worst nightmare and Mr. Gravel came to my rescue like a true Gladiator and I would forever be eternally grateful!! I absolutely recommend Mr. Gravel to anyone looking for an attorney that specializes in bankruptcy, he will definitely get the job done, no doubt!

In 2018 I got a DUI involving another car, I was charged with a felony DUI. I felt like the world was going to end, I was 24 (at the time of the accident), my BA was over 1.8, I was driving over 80mph, and I hit another car causing bruising on the passenger's leg. I was charged with major bodily harm, this was the lowest moment of my life.

Mrs. Feigelson took my case, she dove into my history of alcoholism after leaving Afghanistan. She got to know me and strategized a legal defense that connected my service-related PTSD to the legal trouble I found myself in. Mrs. Feigelson fought for me to be transferred into Veterans Court. Her knowledge of the court system and thorough understanding of programs that are uniquely tailored to her clients let me have another chance at life. Without her help, I would have gotten that felony, I would have lost my future. She stood by me for over 2 years making court appearances on my behalf. She is more than a lawyer, she's someone who you can trust will do everything in her power to get you the best outcome. I can not describe the amount of esteem and admiration I have for her. I graduated from Veterans court and my entire DUI was taken off my criminal record and dismissed.

Life will happen, and sometimes you end up somewhere you don't want to be. If you have a criminal case, especially a DUI Mrs. Feigelson is the lawyer you need. I promise you won't regret it. If I ever run into any legal trouble again, she is the only lawyer I would hire 10/10.

I lost one of my eyes after a strange intrigue. It's a difficult story to explain in just a few words, even though I have no privacy or intimacy. They're reading my mind, and they're not people I trust. I'm being used as a cover-up for a historical bombshell. The guy who shot me in the eye was an old childhood friend, and long before that, he was with me in the woods, where they entered my mind for the first time, scaring me and making me run. Someone was waiting for me at a distance, because they already knew and it was their objective, saying there were problems there and that there was a safe place we were going to. Understand, I never imagined this business of entering another person's mind, and that's why I thought there was someone there with bad intentions. Today I understand that I was being filmed, and that they could confuse me with this mind-entering scheme. I can say that they had done this to other people, because other things coincidental with this happened before, but I wanted more intimacy to tell you about those. The place where this happened, the woods, when I was still a child, I heard on the radio the story of a call for the police, who was at his house armed because he already knew the police were coming. He was about to kill him, and a policeman approached the wooden gate and looked through the hole to see if anyone was there, receiving a shot in the eye. Then he ran into the same woods. This story was narrated by Gil Gomes on the radio here in Brazil. This guy who was waiting for me later shot at other acquaintances when I was approaching the place, making me believe that there was somehow a way of controlling people to bring me closer to death, trouble, or connections with it, in any way, to cause problems. Since that time, my dreams have often been controlled, and afterwards things similar to the dream happened. People being arrested, breakups with girlfriends, and others. But I managed to live, because I always worked, until I took a civil service exam, passed, and lost my job due to persecution by people. Today I am a slave to people who enter my mind. But this story has many more things, and crimes against people. I wanted to have the opportunity to tell you. Yes, people were killed, people control and cause deaths. I'm being silenced. Nobody's helping me here in Brazil, they're just manipulating me.

reviews.text:
Evans Law Firm has been a powerful force in shedding light on the realities of elder abuse—especially abusers that hide behind manipulation, isolation, and financial exploitation. Their assertiveness is essential in navigating very complex situations where truth needs to be uncovered and justice pursued.
For anyone facing the difficult task of finding advocation for an elder who has been mistreated or taken advantage of, this firm offers not only legal expertise but the kind of moral clarity and strategic guidance that makes recovery possible. I am deeply grateful for their work and highly recommend their services.

Evans Law Firm's website explicitly states they handle "whistleblower cases for false claims for government payments." I contacted them with a documented False Claims Act case involving systematic Medicaid fraud by a managed care plan - exactly matching their stated practice area. I presented:

False claims against federal Medicaid program
Systematic denial of medically necessary care while collecting government premiums
Documented evidence of insurance fraud
Opioid-specific discrimination affecting all beneficiaries
51-day obstruction of prescribed medical equipment
Ms. Evans personally stated this is "not in their scope" despite their website advertising this exact type of case. This is false advertising. If your firm doesn't actually handle False Claims Act whistleblower cases involving government healthcare fraud, remove that language from your website. Don't waste potential clients' time claiming expertise you won't apply. I'll be filing a complaint with the California State Bar for misleading advertising under Rule 7.1 (Communications Concerning a Lawyer's Services).Potential clients: Look elsewhere for qui tam representation. This firm says they handle it but apparently doesn't.

Update – October 19, 2025 (Ethics & Professional Conduct):
After my original review, I received a written case-declination email from Evans Law dated October 13, 2025, sent by “paralegal-in-training Haley Lewis” and signed by Ingrid Evans. The same message lists whistleblower and False Claims Act cases as a firm practice area—the exact type of case I presented—yet my case was rejected as “not in scope.”

On Sunday, October 19, 2025, at approximately 8:30 a.m. PT, Ms. Ingrid Evans personally called me from a private number to pressure me to remove this truthful review and to “apologize” for her paralegal’s mistake. This was unsolicited, outside business hours, and followed a written declination, meaning no attorney-client relationship existed.

Under the California Rules of Professional Conduct, this conduct raises multiple concerns:

Rule 7.1 – Misleading Communications About Legal Services: advertising FCA/whistleblower expertise while refusing a qualifying case.

Rule 7.3 – Direct Contact with Prospective Clients: intrusive, private-number call to a non-client constitutes improper solicitation.

Rule 8.4(d) – Conduct Prejudicial to the Administration of Justice: using concealed contact to influence or intimidate a reviewer undermines public trust.
This behavior also falls under harassment and potential retaliation prohibited by the Consumer Review Fairness Act (15 U.S.C. § 45b), which protects consumers’ right to post honest feedback.

I have preserved the call log, screenshots, and the declination email as evidence. New Google reviews for this firm now appear to be disabled, suggesting an attempt to suppress public criticism. Everything stated here is factual, documented, and will be submitted to the appropriate authorities for review.
reviews.ownerResponse: We handle qui tam cases but the caller talked to our new intake paralegal who was nervous and said the wrong thing, the caller should please give a new employee a little grace when they are learning the job and nervous. This review is uncalled for, defamatory, and harassment.
Thank you!

reviews.text: While one never really wants to need the services of an attorney, it’s a relief to find the one you know will go to bat for you. When my siblings and I were faced with elder financial fraud and abuse by our grandfather’s caregiver after he had passed, we were angry, hurt, and most of all, lost as to what to do next. A quick Google search gave us a list of elder abuse attorneys, and the Evans Law Firm stood head and shoulders above the rest. We received a phone call within the hour of submitting the online free evaluation form, and thus began our litigation process. After nearly a year of in-depth investigating and depositions, the truth prevailed and a settlement strongly in our favor was reached. So strong, that Ingrid stated that petitioners (us) rarely, if ever, get everything in the settlement they were requesting (which we did). It was only due to Ingrid and her team’s thoroughness and experience in these types of cases that the truth was overwhelmingly in our favor. We appreciated the care, concern, and tenacity of Ingrid and Evans Law Firm, even if the process was one of the most stressful and emotionally taxing any of us have ever faced.

reviews.text: Outstanding Team.  Exceptional Service.  Could not fault this company at all.
Ms. Evans helped in my case by filtering the important facts and creating a clear strategy to follow. She was always available for questions during the process.

Ingrid Evans was a bright light during one of the darkest periods of my life.

Unlike other attorneys I had talked to, Ingrid wasn't taking our case with monetary figures in mind.
Ingrid is one of those rare attorneys who still has a keen sense of justice, and a sense of what is and is not acceptable in a decent society.
She didn't even give me a monetary figure of what the case might be worth. She took our case because she knew that what was done to my mom was an outrage.

Watching Ingrid work is like watching a master artist or skillful warrior at work. I was constantly amazed at how skillfully she not only refuted the opposing lawyers' arguments, but went on the offense getting them on every point of negligence that the people they were defending had committed.
I'm an artist and musician, and I've always admired watching someone who is really masterful at what they do. Ingrid is exactly that in her profession: a master at work in the legal profession. That combined with an empathetic and compassionate heart, makes her a rare person in this day and age.

She's one in a million. She and her team are all very personable as well as professional at what they do.

Besides everything I've mentioned thus far, Ingrid went WAY above and beyond what she was hired to do. She helped me with multiple issues that came up that were not part of our contract. And not just a little bit, but she followed up everything she helped me with all the way, far beyond what any other attorney would have done.

Ingrid is a true humanitarian. She's one of those "hero lawyers" that you see in movies or TV shows that you always hope really exists somewhere, but you rarely find in real life.

I don't know how much time I have left on the earth, but Ingrid Evans is one of those people that will always be a hero in my life's story.

Most sincerely,

Ingrid Evans is a brilliant attorney and a person of great integrity.  Her extraordinary legal expertise, exceptional trial skills, and commitment to justice is only matched by her kindness, empathy, and passion to protect the vulnerable who have no voice.

Ingrid was a key speaker at a Financial Elder Abuse Conference I attended.  Every word of her talk was inspiring and exactly what I needed to hear to realize our story wasn’t uncommon.

I shared our story of the nasty legal battle of many years against corporate greed and predatory lending.
The lender/salesperson knew mom and dad were sick and dying.  But that didn’t stop him from isolating them from family making it easy to prey on them.

I never suspected that my mom and dad would be the target of a greedy lender and slick salesman who would intentionally deprive them of their home and the comfortable retirement they worked for all their lives.  But that was exactly what happened to my trusting parents.  Dad was in the last month of his life with terminal cancer and mom had Alzheimer’s Disease and could only talk about her dogs she loved so much.
Without hesitation Ingrid took our case and simply said “It is the right thing to do”.

From that moment she sprung into action.  She motivated us when we felt helpless and scared.  Her organization of our case brought a sense of calm to our family that served us throughout our legal battles and over the years since.  She helped us voice mom and dad’s story to prevent similar experiences from happening to thousands of other seniors.

We are forever grateful to Ingrid.  If you even suspect your elderly parents are victims of financial elder abuse, don’t wait until there is a crisis.  Call Ingrid Evans about preventing, detecting, and remedying elder financial abuse of your loved ones.

reviews.text:
I just want to say that Ingrid is the only one who was willing to help my mom and take my moms case. She has put in a lot of time and hard work to help my mom get the justice she deserves after some bad people sold her house right out from under her and made her homeless at 80 yrs. old. reviews.text: We contacted Evans Law Firm when we were unable to collect on a Long-Term Life Insurance policy for an elderly family member.  Ingrid responded almost immediately with an offer of a free consultation.  I was immediately impressed with her passion for justice!!  She contacted me numerous times and gave great advice.  And even though the family decided to pursue the claim on their own (at least at this point) Ingrid was gracious and helpful in citing a ruling that may be helpful to the case.  I would highly recommend the Evans Law Firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the very kind feedback,

reviews.text:
As someone who faced the daunting challenge of navigating the aftermath of a work-related accident, I can't express enough gratitude for Rob Wyman, an exceptional Workmen’s Comp. lawyer.

Rob's compassion and kindness were evident from the moment I reached out for help. Despite feeling overwhelmed by the denial of my claim and the extensive medical procedures I underwent due to being hit by a car while working, Rob listened attentively to my concerns and patiently explained the entire legal process to me.

Throughout the ordeal, Rob and his dedicated staff, notably Molly, provided unwavering support and guidance. Molly's willingness to address my numerous questions with patience and clarity was immensely reassuring during a time of uncertainty.

During my deposition, Rob's professionalism and expertise shone brightly, providing me with the confidence that someone capable was fighting for my rights and well-being. His diligent efforts culminated in a settlement that not only covered my medical expenses but also provided the means for me to fully recover without financial strain.

Thanks to Rob's compassionate approach and unwavering dedication to his clients, I felt genuinely supported throughout the entire legal proceedings. I highly recommend Rob Wyman to anyone in need of a Workmen’s Comp. lawyer who not only possesses the necessary expertise but also genuinely cares about their clients' well-being.

Mr. Wyman who schedule a phone call today, he clarified and explained thoroughly about my case,  so I understand how my case has been working and updated status in addition to the future development.  Since I never got involved in any worker comp case, he would walk me through with every single step, and he was able to resolve all my questions, doubt and uncertainty.
The firm was very attentive and great at answering my questions. They promptly replied to any emails and explained everything. Even though my case was 'small' they fought for the right settlement.
Right off the bat I felt like I was in good hands.

I can't recommend Aaron enough. From the very first conversation, he was incredibly knowledgeable and reassuring. During what was easily one of the most anxious and overwhelming times of my life, he gave me a genuine sense of calm and confidence that I desperately needed. He took the time to explain every step of the process clearly and answered all of my questions promptly. His experience and professionalism were evident throughout, and I always felt that my case was in capable hands. If you're looking for a lawyer who is not only highly skilled but also compassionate, this is absolutely the person you want by your side.

Aaron is the best! I got my first DUI earlier this year  and I’m so glad I went with him when I needed an attorney. He got my court verdict to be better than I expeected. Super nice, respectful, & professional. If you need help with your DUI case don’t hesitate to contact him!

I was pulled over and charged with a DUI even though I was under the legal limit. I had done the responsible thing—slept off a night of July 4th drinking—and any alcohol in my system was residual. It was early in the morning, and I may have briefly drifted toward the shoulder from fatigue, but I wasn’t impaired.

Aaron Bortel believed in me from the start. When the DA offered a “dry reckless” deal—a non-DUI conviction that many attorneys would have accepted as a win—Aaron kept fighting for a full dismissal. He did this even though I had already paid him in full months earlier.

Aaron truly went to bat for me. He took the time to get to know who I am and helped me show the judge that I’m someone who gives back to his community and who could face serious professional consequences from a conviction. His advocacy made all the difference.

I recommend Aaron Bortel without hesitation. He’s not only a skilled attorney, he’s a principled and committed one.

A family member needed guidance with his case, and I helped him search for an attorney. Fortunately we found Aaron. Aaron was patient, professional, and knowledgeable, making an overwhelming process manageable. He made sure we understood the options and was comfortable with the strategy every step of the way. With Aaron's advocacy, we got the best possible result. I highly recommend Aaron.

Aaron has excellent connections, professionalism, recommendations, and bedside manner for navigating this incredibly difficult and stressful process/system. I would have been far worse off having not hired him for my case. Highly recommend his services.

When you need legal representation do yourself a favor and call Aaron Bortel.  Aaron is a lifesaver.  He will guide you through a difficult and challenging process and get you the results you're looking for.  I was scared to death when I got pulled over for a DUI charge and Aaron helped steady me up and keep me glued together.  The process has been time consuming but he represented me and I didn't really have to go to court.  Follow his exact instructions and stay positive and you'll make it through the difficult times.  Thank you Aaron for your courtesy and professionalism I appreciate it more than I can explain!  -Blake R. Gates

Aaron was able to help me with my second DUI case in San Francisco. He’s very knowledgeable and knows people in the court system. I ended up taking a Plea Deal that resulted in the best possible outcome. Did not serve jail time, and paid less for the second DUI than my wet reckless. He also worked diligently with the DMV and fought to not get an automatic two year suspension on my license. Luckily I am able to get a restricted license. Aaron was always responsive and directly contacted me to handle anything that needed to be completed. He also had the best price out of any lawyer I spoke to and was able to work with me financially. He made the process and the experience of a second DUI way less stressful! Definitely recommend!

First of all with due respect I want to Thanks to Mr Aaron Bortel Sir.
I have been arrested in San Francisco county for DUI and speeding charges both at the same time. This is was my first offense and i was so scared what should i do next , seems like everything is finished. After talking to many law offices i was unsatisfied. Luckily i got Mr Aaron Bortel law firm and we talked every single details about my arrest on phone call and i was so confident to hand my case to Mr Bortel sir. As i am a CDL holder he ensure me that he will help me to drive for long time with Class A and i was driving with CDL for 7 months after my arrest. Finally helped in dropping charges to reckless driving from DUI ( BAC 0.14) Unexpected results 💯
Thank you so much Sir.

I'm here to talk a little about Law Firm of Aaron Bortel, I met Aaron about two years ago for an unfortunate circumstance I was in. When I got pulled over for dui, I didn't know who to turn to as there are many dui lawyers out there. Through some recommendations, I was introduced to Aaron's law firm and since he became my lawyer, he has been very communicative and has made it easy to understand the process. I am happy to say that he was able to dismiss my dui case!! I would highly recommend Aaron as he is extremely good at what he does. Thank you so much for everything Aaron!

Giving a 5-star rating for his expertise, familiarity with Bay Area courts, and excellent customer service! Getting a DUI is a scary, but hiring Aaron as my attorney felt like I was reversing my screw up. He will consult with you on the best possible outcome, make himself available for answering your questions, and he follows through on everything he says he will timely. Don’t go to anyone else in Marin!

Aaron Bortel is an excellent DUI attorney.  He has extensive knowledge of the law (DUI) and has many years of experience with an excellent reputation.  His ability to break down the complexities of the process and translate it to easily understood options was extremely beneficial.  His guidance was spot on and helped to navigate each step of the DUI process.  Aaron is on your side and will fight for you every step of the way.  More importantly, he cares about you as a person and cares about getting the best outcome for your specific case.  Highly recommended!

Attorney Aaron Bortel is the kind of DUI attorney everyone facing charges in the Bay Area should hire. He is equally a compassionate human and a brilliant attorney at the same time. Attorney Bortel genuinely cares about his clients, going beyond just caring about the outcome of their case. He is a tough attorney when he needs to fight for you and only wants the best future for everyone he represents.

A while back I got in trouble and was looking for someone to defend me for a DUI charge, it seemed like I was going to get charged. From the first time I called him among several other lawyers I knew he was the one to defend me. Aaron worked with me tirelessly and answered my calls at any time of the day even weekends. He was always reassuring and I knew that I could put my trust in him. As a result of working with him I was able to get a DIVERSION and NO CRIMINAL CONVICTION. If you need a lawyer who will fight tirelessly to get your case dismissed or the best result possible, I would 100% recommend Aaron Bortel, he's truly been a lifesaver.

My experience with Aaron Bortel  Esq. My attorney who defended me in court in San Francisco for a DUI ,which occurred  in June of 2017, has been absolutely outstanding. Extremely efficient, Mr. Bortel  managed to reduce my charge to a Wet Reckless. This resulted in a unsupervised probation and a vey swift and efficient court appearance. Our follow up conversations have always been very timely as well, including excellent advice and information when requested. I most certainly recommend Mr. Bortel   to anybody who is in need of legal counsel when confronted with a DUI issues.
I endorse this lawyer. With strong advocacy, he remains current with new law and nuances within various counties. A real DUI attorney.
reviews.authorName: Rencher Law Group, P.C. Accident and Wrongful Death

reviews.text: If I ever get pulled over for a DUI in San Francisco or anywhere in Northern California, Aaron Bortel would be the first person I’d call and the only attorney that I would want to represent me. As a fellow attorney, my standards for legal representation are very high! Aaron is an extremely skilled DUI defense attorney with years of experience. He is a true warrior who fights hard to get the very best results for his clients. For 25 years, when anybody has asked me for a referral to a DUI attorney in Northern California, the only name I give them is Aaron Bortel!

As a fellow California DUI attorney, I've sought technical advice from San Francisco/Marin DUI attorney Aaron Bortel on a number of complex matters. Mr. Bortel is a seasoned DMV and DUI trial attorney. He is an unparalleled advocate for his clients and a leader in our field. Mr. Bortel has achieved the respect of his colleagues, judges, and opposing counsel over the years not only for his intelligence and calm demeanor in court, but for his tenacity in defending those charged with motor vehicle offenses. If you are considering hiring Mr. Bortel, look no further.
If you have been charged with driving under the influence and are looking for a DUI attorney you will not find another attorney with more knowledge and expertise on the subject than Aaron Bortel.

Aaron Bortel is an extremely knowledgable and hard working attorney who I have often consulted with because of his expertise in DUI and driving related crimes.  He has been practicing in the SF Bay-Area for over 20 years and knows how to get the best results for his clients in every local courthouse.  If you are charged with a DUI you should consult with Aaron before you hire any lawyer. He will give you an honest and thorough evaluation of your case.

Tom and his team has represented my friends, my husband and my mom. His team gets the job done with little effort on your part. I whole heartedly recommend him and his team. You won't regret hiring him.

I highly recommend this attorney to everyone. This was my first accident, and the other party offered very little compensation despite my significant losses. Lininger helped me immensely by arranging all my treatments, providing guidance, and referring me to professional doctors. I didn't have to pay anything out of pocket. After winning my case, he broke down all the expenses, including doctors' bills and other treatments. It was a great experience, but you need to be patient.

I have lived a long and eventful life and I've never used the services of a lawyer;  however, I had a bad fall due to the negligence of workers where I live.  I was shocked that the property management company did not respond to my injuries - even a bunch of flowers followed by a couple of inquiries would have sufficed.
This incensed me and I hired Mr. Tom Lininger, an injury lawyer highly recommended by my doctor.
I hold Mr. Lininger in the highest regard.  He is a straight shooter, returns emails promptly, and is a first-class lawyer.  I felt he cared about the suffering I endured due to pure negligence.
I was afraid working with a lawyer would be stressful, on the contrary, I felt no stress only confidence.

reviews.text: The team at Altair is thorough and professional, but they also do little things to show they care about their clients. From day 1, I felt confident with our case in their hands. I would highly recommend them, and I am very pleased with their work.

Altair Law is the kind of firm you feel confident turning to when you need real expertise and steady guidance. Their team is sharp, attentive, and clearly committed to doing things the right way. What stood out most is how they treat people. They communicate well, handle the details with care, and make you feel supported through the tough moments. If you’re looking for strong advocates who pair skill with genuine compassion, Altair Law is an easy recommendation.

I was introduced to Altair Law through my work with Mee Mee Wong, and after seeing firsthand how hard she and the firm fight for their clients, they’ve become one of our go-to firms in the country for referrals. Mee Mee is truly exceptional at what she does, and the firm is a strong reflection of her dedication, skill, and work ethic.

Craig Peters is a first class human and an incredible trial lawyer. If you need sophisticated and compassionate representation for a catastrophic injury in San Fransisco, CA I highly recommend this firm.

Jeremy and Craig at Altair Law are exceptional lawyers. They are deeply invested in their cases, incredibly professional, and impressively organized. Their dedication, clear communication, and genuine care for clients make them stand out. I highly recommend Altair Law to anyone seeking top tier legal representation.

After one of the worst days of my life due to an unfortunate accident with a delivery driver, I had the great fortune of discovering Kevin and Josh at Altair Law.  From our first conversations about the event, I knew that his was the right group to be working with.  First and foremost was their genuine concern for my well-being.  Next was their professional empathy, transparency, broad experience, superb legal skills and exceptional wisdom.  Every step of the way keeping me appraised of the process and educating me as to decisions and plans.  I was so impressed with what excellent people Kevin and Josh were. Obviously deeply caring about their clients while being truly committed to utilize their vast knowledge and skills to represent individuals like myself who had been injured through preventable means!  I am a firm believer that everything has a silver lining and in this case, finding Altair Law, working with Kevin and Josh, and ultimately coming to an excellent settlement (as a result of their relentless and diligent work) exceeded my expectations and was, in fact, that silver lining!  Kevin, Josh on behalf of my family and myself, THANK YOU for all that you do!!  I certainly hope that I will never need your services again, however if I do, you will be my first call.  In the meantime I will wholeheartedly refer and recommend the two of you and Altair Law!!  Cheers!  Jordan

I am fortunate to have been referred to Altair Law after my accident in 2020.  After 3 months of hospitalization and rehab, my future mobility and recovery were uncertain.  My advocates at Altair Law were immediately working with me, my partner, and the insurance companies to resolve the rather massive costs rendered by an uninsured motorist.  They arranged evaluations by medical specialists that helped estimate what residual care I might need over time.  I now appreciate that effort, as I have the funds to pursue therapies, individual training, and mind-nourishing travel.  Their encouragement and persistent attention greatly reduced stress and helped me to a remarkable result.  I would recommend Altair Law unreservedly.

Nancy Achorn
I can’t recommend Altair Law enough for the services they provide. Truly a world-class firm for seeking just resolutions for personal injury cases. 🙏🏼
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words.  We are pleased that the case resolved favorably for you and that Altair is recognized for its commitment to our clients.

reviews.text:
Altair Law LLP successfully represented me as the plaintiff on a vehicle injury accident, against a major car insurance company, for a case which began in 2019.

I can confidently state the Judicial System in California is highly complex, and only capable attorneys can properly navigate it, let alone be able to explain it. Noah took the time and help me understand each component of my case for each phase, every step of the way. From the very initial discovery stage to mediation, and the final phase when the case finalized.

I commend Altair Law LLP for not only being professional, but also being understanding and approachable. Their skills and expertise through the entirety of my case was crucial.

The successful outcome at the end of my case could not have happened without their efforts.

Having dealt with many Attorneys in the past, I had lost all faith in the "human side" behind them.  When my husband and I started with this case, I was apprehensive. We were in a very dark place. Joshua and Kevin renewed my belief in the care behind the process. They worked hard on all their clients behalf, kept us updated, and continuously checked in on our well being.  They truly showed compassion which was important to this long long case. I am certain it was extremely difficult to navigate. I truly appreciate them, their team, as well as their families for giving so much to us personally, and to all of the participants in the case.

I have know Kevin Morrison since we met in law school 30 years ago.  I know many personal injury attorneys.  If I had an accident, Kevin would be the first call I would make, and he would be the attorney I would hire.  I know I would be in the best hands possible if Kevin handled my claim/case.  I have referred clients to Kevin over the years, and they have been extremely pleased with him and his work.

I live and work in LA with the best of the best attorneys who actually recommended Altair Law up in San Francisco for my case. I heard Craig Peters was a "bull dog" and boy were they right! You'd never be able to tell unless in a courtroom or formal proceeding... He flew to my house and was so warm and kind to my little girl and I while going through a catastrophe. He was always available for questions and checked on me frequently while making strategic moves on my behalf. He's brilliant and successful at what he does but he also truly cares for his clients! When it came time... He fought for me like no other and, of course, we won. To say this law firm is way ahead of the rest is an understatement. They are cool, reputable, professional and highly experienced. I can't thank them enough. A+++

This review is in regards to my lawsuit that took about two years to complete. I was recommended to Altair Law firm and Jeremy Cloyd from a friend immediately after I was involved in a personal injury motor vehicle accident. Jeremy and his team provided answers, confidence, and a game plan on how we were going to move forward in my case. Immediately after my accident and the chaos my life was thrown into, it was reassuring that Jeremy and his team had my best interests in mind.

Throughout the two years, I always felt that I was kept in the loop about any developments regarding my case. I felt that Jeremy listened to my wants and concerns and provided many options moving forward. I never felt pressured into any direction, but rather was given options and outcomes of any decisions I had to make. I was provided the best doctors and best experts to help support my body and my case. I always felt that I had a friend fighting for me and someone I could contact at anytime.

Although this chapter in my life is coming to an end, the outcome and my experience were so positive that I am left feeling that I was well taken care of. I thank Jeremy Cloyd and everyone on his team for doing their best to ensure that a bad situation has a positive outcome.
Altair is a firm of outstanding trial lawyers who care deeply about their clients and obtaining the best result possible.  They are fearless in the courtroom and able to take on any defendant.

My attorney let the opposing party’s insurance completely run the show. My attorney did such a poor job representing my interests that I was basically given 3 choices. 1: accept the low ball settlement, 2: fire my attorney and hire another, or 3: handle this by myself. I essentially had no choice but to settle my case for much less than it was worth because of such poor representation. Heaven forbid I ever need another attorney, but if I do I’ll be sure to steer clear of this firm. A complain with the California Bar Association will be filed.
They we very helpful. Keep me updated about case.

reviews.text:
Working with Nick Neidzwski and his team was a pleasure.  I was kept current with all the filings, and Nick took the time to clearly explain all details, the possible outcomes, and what would/could happen depending upon the actions he took.  I was professionally and compassionately guided through this long process, which was quite complicated.  Nick returns calls promptly and was very conscientious in his communications.

Nick exemplifies his passion for the law, his respect for the judicial system and his extreme knowledge of Maritime law.  I am so thankful that he represented our case.  Nick worked diligently and was tireless in pursuing the best possible outcome.

When I was laying in the hospital, I called a few maritime lawyers, I started with those recommended by my shipmates.... left messages and waited for responses. I then called Nick’s office after googling West Coast Maritime lawyers. A day later his assistant got back to me, then Nick. I reached out to get a lawyer in the first place because the shipping company and even my shipmates seemed to leave me in the dark... it was an ROS ship, so we were close, felt weird that they couldn’t answer my simplest questions.

Nick came in, laid out his plan, what he needed from me, and what he was willing to do for me. And for 2+ years.... he stuck to the plan. He had an answer for every curb ball they threw at us. Every time there was a tough situation, he explained it, and allowed me to have a say in the process. From beginning to the end, he always asked me what I thought of the situation. He always kept me updated on all situations, even cc me in most emails. Nick never gave me a reason to lose confidence in him, EVER.

When I first got injured, I knew I was going to get something, the amount I had in my head was $500,000! So when they dangled $1,000,000 they really had my attention. But Nick broke down the process, advice that I decline and allowed me to make my own decision... I decline... and settles for over 3 times their first offer, over 7 times the amount I originally thought my case was worth.

Here it is after the settlement... money is  in the bank... and Nick and his assistant still call to check up on me, still offer suggestions, still willing to walk me through any processes I may need. That mean a lot. I can’t really say enough about Nick, professional, and a friend. If you want things done right, I suggest you call him up!

Nick Neidzwski is an outstanding attorney.  Not only is he a hardworking and a persuasive litigator, but he is also the classic gentleman attorney – a fair, courteous, and nice man.  I highly recommend him for maritime, Jones Act and personal injury cases in all the states in which he is licensed to practice law, which include California, Alaska, Oregon, and Washington
Employee Miguel Val ncia lacks ethics, professionalism and character.

I wanted to share my experience from years ago that I just happened to remember very recently. Everything was going good until the day of my deposition. I had an accident where I got rear ended by a Honda and it pushed me into a mini van. I talked to only one person from this law firm for a year or so then the day of my deposition, they last minute switched someone else to take the OG guy’s place. This guy knew nothing about my case, claimed that I lied about a day that I was having extreme back pain to the point I could not sleep also while having the flu. Which caused me to call off of work and go to a random chiropractor the next day. The day of the deposition, I noticed I didn’t note what happened down on my end but I remember telling the original guy I was talking to about it. This new guy proceeded to go BACK AND FORTH with me saying how I’m a liar and that I lied to them. Lied to them where? Lied to them how? Sir, I have NEVER spoken to YOU. That instance really put a bad taste in my mouth for this law firm.

I would definitely recommend contacting a firm that would actually note down everything that you communicated to them. Because life gets crazy and it’s THEIR JOB to build a case against the other party. NOT the people that they’re working for. Very weird business practices that they got going on over there. I have not recommended them to any of my friends or people I’m close to due to that experience that took a 180 all of a sudden.

I hope that guy does not represent this law firm anymore as well.

Brian Larsen and Joseph Lee represented me in a catastrophic injury that occurred three years ago.  I was destroyed after a truck ran over me when I was walking to work. Brian fought the insurance company for an amazing outcome like he was a member of my family for over three years.  I never felt like I was just a “client”. My wife and I have received advice and assistance from Marco Ambron on several occasions now. He helped my wife and her sister with DACA applications and petitions for advance parole, and, most recently, he helped my wife obtain her permanent residence. Throughout every step of the process, Marco always went out of his way to keep us informed and provide thoughtful answers to our numerous questions. As an attorney myself (criminal law, not immigration), I can honestly say that Marco's professionalism, commitment to his clients' needs, and his knowledge of the law is exceptional. He and his staff are always courteous and respectful. We never felt rushed when meeting with them or felt that they were unavailable or unwilling to listen to our concerns. What really sets Marco apart from many other immigration attorneys I have encountered is his genuine compassion for the people who seek his assistance. He is among those few lawyers whose interpersonal skills are equally as strong as his legal abilities. The immigration system has a way of dehumanizing those who pass through it, and Marco clearly strives to make those with whom he works feel like people again--not just "clients"--as he helps them navigate the cumbersome and difficult processes related to immigration law. Through the years, I have met many immigration attorneys of varying levels of skill, but Marco is among the best I have seen. My wife and I are extremely thankful to him and to his staff for the tremendous work they have done for us.

reviews.text:
I was in a car vs. bike accident in the winter of 2023. As the cyclist, I was injured very badly and was looking at a long recovery. I was advised to sue, but I had no idea where to start looking for a lawyer. I put out a post on my social media asking for a recommendation for a personal injury lawyer that didn't seem like a used car salesman. As it happens, one of the lawyers at Gomerman, Bourn & Associates (shout out to Ashley Pellouchoud) saw my post and reached out.

I had the pleasure of being represented by Robert Hester, with assistance from paralegal Jessica Rodriguez. They were quick and clear in their communication, and took time to make sure that I understood everything along the way. The team took a special interest in my case and provided critical legal council when tough decisions had to be made. I knew that they had my best interest at heart, and that I could trust them to lead me in the right direction.

I hope to never need a lawyer again, but if I do, Robert and the team will be the first people I call.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Jackson, for your thoughtful review and for allowing our team to be part of your journey toward recovery. We wish you all the best ahead.

reviews.text: I have spoken with Salma regarding the possibility of taking my case. After careful consideration and discussion they were not able to help me with my case but she put me in contact with the right people that did. I spoke with her and several others at the law firm and they were all exceedingly friendly and very accommodating and knowledgeable and I wouldn't hesitate to use them again in the future.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Robert for your kind review. We appreciate you sharing your positive experience with Gomerman | Bourn & Associates - especially your interactions with Salma. If we can be of any help in the future, please don't hesitate to contact us. Wishing you all the best!

reviews.text: Such a great experience! I called and got all the information I needed and some. Salma was excellent, patient and  informative. I would definitely recommend this firm10 out of 10.

Fantastic experience with Gomerman Bourn & Associates. Our daughter was attacked by a dog and we hired GBA. Everyone we interacted with at the firm throughout this whole process made us feel at ease. The insurance company on the other side tried to push but GBA pushed right back even harder every time. Our daughter even told us she wants to be an attorney like the attorneys at GBA so she can help kids who are attacked by dogs. Sniffle. I hope we do not need any attorneys in the future but we will immediately hire GBA if we do. Amazing people at this firm.

Tanya and Robert helped represent me for a complicated wrongful death case/survival action case. They went above and beyond to and did a phenomenal job. They were sensitive to the challenges of reliving difficult moments and transparent every step of the way. Respectful, capable, supportive, and just really good at what they do. If you are on the fence, pick this team, they are trustworthy, honest, and compassionate.
Helped me with a personal injury claim which was insanely complicated due to the VA being involved. The claim was life changing money. Would recommend this office to all my friends and family.

We had the misfortune of being involved in a personal injury case, but fortunate enough to have Tanya, Robert and team in our corner. The truth of the matter is, no one hopes to need an attorney -- but when you do, you'd best have a good one.

My case is finally resolved. I feel neutral but optimistic. There were a lot of obstacles to overcome. I'm learning to move on past the negative feelings that a lawsuit will no doubt bring up. That I feel positive at all is largely due to how calm, professional, fair, knowledgeable, connected, responsive, and empathetic Tanya's team is.

If you examined my case, it's clear that Tanya, Robert and team did an amazing job. Just about every box was checked. I would still trade it all in a heartbeat for the injury case to never have come up. Only a genie could do that. Tanya, Robert and team were the next best thing.

I would not hesitate to recommend this firm, but hope to never need to.

As a side note, I happened to notice that the Law Office of Tanya Gomerman was a sponsor for a gala I happened to attend, and I think that's awesome!

My family and I retained the services of Tanya Gomerman's law firm for a slip and fall case involving my mother.  Both Tanya and her colleague, Robert Hester, thoroughly explained every step of the process and patiently answered the many questions we had along the way.  More importantly, we felt that Tanya and Robert truly had my mother's best interests at heart.  We highly recommend the Law Offices of Tanya Gomerman!

I haven't used her service yet but whenever I send her emails regarding employment or injury related questions, she responds promptly with very useful information. No doubt, I'll be hiring her in the future if any thing happens.

This review is long overdue. A little over three years ago, I was hit by a car making an illegal right turn while on my bike commute to work. After reaching out to a friend who had also been hit by a car while cycling and had been represented by Shaana, I made an appointment with Shaana for a consultation and I was immediately convinced that she was the right attorney to handle my case. Shaana listened attentively, asked detailed questions, and clearly explained my options for moving forward. More important for me, however, she was empathetic and sensitive to the struggles I was going through as someone who had been hit and had undergone surgery as a result. While I know that I was not Shaana’s only client (in fact, she was working on much bigger cases than mine), I always felt seen and heard, and when she was working on my case, her attention was fully focused on me. Shaana was a tireless advocate for me, fighting to get me the best settlement possible, and she was always available to answer any of my questions and concerns. In the end, I was very pleased with the settlement that Shaana secured.

Being hit by a car is something I would never wish on anyone, but if it happens to you and you need representation, you can’t go wrong with Shaana Rahman.

I needed help resolving a serious Car-Bicycle accident case and Shaana and her team delivered knowledge, expertise, patience, guidance and ultimately an outcome that left me and my family very pleased. "Big Firm" expertise with "Small Firm" care and accessibility.

I never wanted to be crushed in between a utility bed truck and my work trailer but guess what, life happens..
It was a rough few months dealing with insurance companies and doctors.
I never dealt with anything like this before!
I was at my wits and realized I needed help.
After meeting with Shaana personally I knew I was in good hands. Not only as a lawyer, but as a friend. Every step of the way she and her team made sure that I was not only comfortable but made sure I was taken care of in my best interest.
I plan to call again if needed and I highly recommend Shaana Rahman Law.

My firm represents employees exclusively and Ms. Rahman's firm is one of just a couple of firms to which we refer clients who have been injured.  Over the years, we have referred many clients to her, and have received nothing but stellar feedback about her work.  I will enthusiastically continue to refer cases to Ms. Rahman.
Shaana is what we most admire in great attys: competent, compassionate, hardworking, a fighter. She'll change you life for the better.
I recommend Rahman Law bike injury cases.
Fierce advocacy.

I had an ABSOLUTELY OUTSTANDING experience with Shaana and her team.  Her personal investment in my case, deep expertise in the cycling domain, dogged pursuit of our obstinate adversary, and frank and thoughtful advice along the way got us to what I am very sure (thanks to some benchmarking) was the very best possible settlement outcome in my situation.  So good that I don't even think anymore about that dude who totaled my time-trial bike and right shoulder with his big sedan and a quick unsignaled right hook.  The Rahman team's execution was flawless and professional, at every step in the process, and nicely modernized by the case-management software platform they use.  I couldn't recommend Shaana and team more highly.

Out of all the attorneys I have spoken to, Rahman law firm gave me advice that wasnt just beneficial, but honest and straightforward. Shaana and Neda both listened to all my concerns and answered any and all questions I may have had. Although I have not decided if I will retain their firm, Shaana put me on a path that has definitely given me a lot more options and outlook on how to pursue my case. If anyone is looking for just some advice or would like to speak to someone who will give them the honest answers, give this place a try. I walked away completely satisfied and hope everyone has a similar experience to what I had. Thank you Shaana and Neda, you guys deserved this review.
reviews.ownerResponse: This is really what it’s all about for us.  Thanks for letting us know!

reviews.text: I had a great experience with Shaana and Neda. They both were very helpful, attentive, professional and made sure I thoroughly understand my situation. I hope I'll never need it, but they would be my first choice if I need a lawyer again.

Thanks to their expertise and persistence, our trademark was successfully obtained—something that had felt increasingly unlikely before they got involved. It was clear that they knew exactly how to navigate the system and advocate effectively on our behalf.

For knowledgeable, responsive, and results-driven legal support for trademarks, I cannot recommend Trevor Caudle Law highly enough.

reviews.text:
Although Mitchell Leeds LLP wasn’t able to take on my case, I was genuinely struck by their compassion and humanness of their response. Unlike every other firm I've reached out to—who sent impersonal template rejections warning about a one-year filing deadline I had already met—someone at Mitchell Leeds clearly took the time to read my message and respond personally.

Their note was brief, but it reflected true empathy, professionalism, and respect. They even went a step further by offering thoughtful attorney referrals and additional resources to help me continue forward. In a process that has often felt cold and discouraging, their kindness reminded me that there are still caring people in the legal profession who see the person behind the case.

I am deeply appreciative of their compassion and truly wish circumstances had allowed them to take my case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Laura, for your kind words. We're deeply committed to treating every person and situation with empathy and respect, so it's heartening to know our approach made a positive impact on you. We sincerely hope the resources and referrals we provided help you find the support and resolution you deserve.

reviews.text: Daryl was excellent at explaining and reviewing my case. I am very grateful for his guidance and help.

reviews.text:
Anyone considering this law firm just know:
I called them to see if they can help with a case. My husband was in the hospital due to a medical malpractice and was diagnosed with DVT, could’ve died cause of a blood clot possibly extending to his organs, not sure if she knows how serious that is. Basically her response was since he didn’t lose a limb, and he’s getting treatment, they don’t want the case. Well treatment isn’t free.
So unless you’re left without a limb or wheelchair they won’t handle you case.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We understand and share your frustration that we were unable to help you with what was a very frightening and serious issue for you and your husband.

We hope you appreciate that because the legislature put caps on the types of recoveries available in medical malpractice cases, that we are unable to assist many people who have suffered from legitimately bad medical care.

Please feel free to call if you want to discuss your case further with one of the attorneys. Although we may not be able to assist you, we can certainly give you a more thorough explanation.

Thank you, Jeff, for the perfect rating! We appreciate your support and are delighted to hear about your positive experience with Mitchell Leeds, LLP. Feel free to reach out if you need anything else in the future.

reviews.text: Very professional and extremely courteous .

reviews.text: Our family is so indebted to this law firm.  My sister (Robyn Frankel) had a surgery that should have never been done and left her a quadriplegic. The Mitchell Law Firm ended up representing her and won the largest verdict in Santa Clara County. Thanks again to your amazing team!

I have nothing but good things to say about Gus Panagotacos and his law firm. Dealing with a personal injury case is often very emotionally difficult and stressful, but Gus did an excellent job representing my family and me.  I initially had reservations and prejudices about hiring a personal injury attorney to help us with this matter, but after speaking with Gus the first time he gave us the confidence we needed to move forward in the process with him by our side. He was very clear about what to expect from him and his team and he worked with us throughout the entire process to make sure we were satisfied with the outcome. Once he agreed to take us on as clients, him and his team got to work immediately and were extremely thorough and diligent. He was always very excellent at keeping us informed along the way and offering his professional opinion. Gus also has an excellent bedside manner and treated us with the upmost respect, kindness and empathy. I appreciate that he was always very transparent and realistic with us, and he did so with grace and sensitivity. We feel so fortunate that we chose him to represent us, and we are happy with the resolution. Anyone would be lucky to have Gus and his team represent them in a personal injury case.

I highly recommend  Ryan Dunn.  He treated me with care, kindness and respect. He and his paralegal were responsive and help me to understand the case process. I am thankful for their professional representation.

I cannot speak more highly of my experience being represented by Ryan Dunn.  He treated me with care, kindness and respect during an extraordinarily difficult time in my life.  He was very available to explain the legal process to me and was understanding of the needs of my children and I.  He was able to effectuate a settlement that will greatly help our family after a serious car accident.  The settlement exceeded all of my expectations and is due entirely to Ryan’s efforts.  We are enormously grateful.

I absolutely love this law firm, Ryan and his team are highly skilled professionals with great customer service etiquette. My only regret is, that they do not practice in the mid-west and Tx area.
Thank you for your continued support and patience during our business ventures together ❤️

I'm a lawyer and have worked closely with Ryan Dunn on a number of cases. Ryan is an exceptional attorney, he has an excellent legal mind, great instincts and street smarts. These are the qualities you want in your attorney. I highly recommend him.

I have referred 3 people to Loren Schwartz who all raved about the professionalism and the results gotten when working with Loren.  I wouldn't hesitate to refer him others I know who unfortunately had an accident and deserves compensation

We were referred to Ryan Dunn after my mother suffered a terrible fall and injury in her apartment building and he helped us navigate the litigation process and brought her to a desired settlement without any added stress. Ryan is extremely easy to work with, responsive, professional, and clearly knows his trade. He gave us great advice throughout and highly recommend him.

Loren Schwartz is an amazing lawyer for those suffering from personal injury.  He is empathetic and kind to his clients, and relentless in his pursuit of fair awards for them.  I have recommended friends and colleagues to Loren and they are always impressed with his practice, team and results.

I suffered an injury that severely affected my ability to work as a professional and forever changed how I approached my everyday life. An attorney I knew referred me to Loren Schwartz, telling me that he is very good at what he does. And boy was that attorney right.

From day one, Loren did everything to delve deep into all aspects of my case and injury. Through years of practicing personal injury law, he has accumulated a vast amount of medical knowledge and experience. He knows how to deal with insurance folks and regularly calls upon a powerful network of medical experts and doctors who are top of their field, who frankly blow the opposing medical experts out of the water with their honest and knowledgeable insights.  They were essential in countering everything the opposing side had to say about my injuries. The other side fought hard, and we did too, for three long years. But every step of the way, I was confident knowing that I could rely 100% on Loren's advice. Maria Mahomar and Esparanza were also consummate professionals working to get the best results for clients as well.

Loren walked me through the details of my own case to objectively understand the strengths and weaknesses. He spared NO effort in advocating the best for me in court with motions, trial preparation, and mediation. Of course, every case is slightly different but everything Loren did in my case laid the foundation for a fair settlement, eventually forcing the other side to see the light.

As someone who previously spent a lot of time giving professional advice to clients, I felt extremely fortunate that Loren was there to give me reliable advice when I needed it. To this day I still count my blessings from having met such a wonderful, talented, and caring attorney.  Thanks to his efforts and the efforts of everyone at the firm, I can finally say my case settled with a great result!

Matt, Gus and the team at Dunn & Panagotacos LLP are consummate professionals who handled my case with the utmost care.  They were able to obtain an outcome which vastly exceeded expectation and did so while providing regular and transparent communication throughout the process.  Should the need arise, I would place my trust in them again without hesitation.

I cannot say enough wonderful things about this firm. From the moment I contacted them about my accident until we settled the case, Gus was fantastic.
Gus (Constantine) Panagotacos handled our case and was extremely thorough and fought with our best interest in mind. We ended up settling for more than expected initially because he stuck with it and made sure we were not taken advantage of during the process.
Gus was also very compassionate and caring to my injuries and explained every detail of our case to make sure we always knew what was going on and were not left wondering.
I hope no one ever needs a personal injury attorney, but if you do, I would absolutely recommend Dunn & Panagotacos as your legal representation.

In 2018 I suffered a work accident. I almost lost my life when a scaffold built by a general contractor collapsed while I was working on it. Luckily only my feet were fractured. As a result of the accident I had surgery to my heel bone back in place with metal screws and a metal plate. The doctor told me that my right heel was like a broken eggshell in many little pieces and I would not be able to run or do the physical activities I used to do before the accident.

And I was shocked to find out that the general contractor was uninsured. The general contractor and homeowner helped me with some money for a few weeks. One day they stopped visiting me and I realized my new reality; I was a cripple in a wheelchair not able to work and provide for my family.

The homeowner's insurance company contacted me and told me  that they didn't have to help me because I was working as a licensed independent contractor when the accident happened. They offered me $5000 - just because they wanted to helping me with some money. That is when I started looking for help. A friend recommended me one of the best of the accident attorneys in the bay area with 38 years of experience. This attorney told me, "You don't have a case. You should take the $5000 they offered you and be grateful." I was very sad and disappointed. It was not my fault that the scaffolding collapsed and now I was a cripple in a wheelchair not able to work.

I talked to another attorney. He said, "Your case is too difficult."
I talk to yet another attorney and he said "I'm too busy to take your case but you can Google superlawyers.com. I hope you can find some one who can help you"

At this point I was very frustrate, I felt like life was pissing on me in a dark cold pit. I said to myself "This is the last time I'm going to call an attorney"
I googled superlawyers.com , I saw a picture of a young attorney and called him. We talked, he said, "Yes indeed, it is a difficult case. But I have a colleague who has experience with difficult cases and he had won a very difficult cases. Would you like to talk to him" I responded, "yes please!'

A few days later, I met Loren Schwartz and his assistant Maria.
My English is good but Maria spoke Spanish and that was a plus.
After a long conversation with Loren, he explained that indeed it was a difficult case but he likes challenges and he was willing to help me.
At that moment I felt like life stopped pissing on me and I saw a light at the end of the tunnel.

Loren is an easy-going attorney who is going to fight with all he has.
It felt like my brother or a good friend was fighting for me.
Loren and Maria always answered the phone and kept me posted. It was a great experience seeing Loren do his work; calling doctors, asking for their expert opinions. That was amazing!!.

After almost 2 years, the case is now closed and I am glad I did not take the money the insurance company offered me in the beginning.
My wife says meeting Loren S. was a blessing and I agree with her meeting Loren was a blessing.
There are good honorable people working at Dunn & Panagotacos

Loren S. and the team at Dunn and Panagotacos were incredible. I had a bit of a messy Personal Injury case, having been in two car accidents (one of which was a hit and run) back to back, a previous attorney who had mishandled my case, and was cutting it close to the deadline to settle the case. But Loren and his team stepped in and listened to my concerns, needs, and frustrations and it was smooth sailing from the moment I signed my case over to them. I appreciated Loren and Maria’s consistent communication and check in’s/updates via phone call and emails. He always laid out all of the different options I had in-front of me, and advised me which ones would be the best course of action given my case. I felt so at ease knowing an honest, competent and compassionate attorney was handling my case. If you’re looking for a firm or an attorney to represent you, Loren and D&P are your guys!

My experience working with Dunn & Panagotacos LLP was an absolute pleasure.  Mr. Dunn provides a level of professionalism and communication that far exceeds other legal firms. I was recommended to Loren Schwartz by my massage therapist after suffering injuries from a car accident. I had a horrible time with my medical providers trying to get proper coverage and treatment, as I was in between moves and my medical coverage had yet to transfer to my new city. Loren was incredibly kind, patient and helpful throughout the process, and gave me more insight and knowledge than I knew I needed. He guided me through the process each step of the way and was always timely about returning my texts and phone calls. I had never worked with an attorney before for anything, and it was one of the most positive experiences of my life. I am forever grateful for his assistance, and feel confidant that I got the best possible outcome from my case considering my circumstances. Ironically, one month after settling my bodily injury case, I was in ANOTHER car accident (this one much more mild), but this time I knew what to do and how to handle it and was able to heal my body with the right providers and have it covered by insurance and settle  without the aide of a lawyer, because I had learned so much from my experience with Loren in the first case. Thank you, thank you, thank you! I am forever grateful! ...and should anyone in my life be so unfortunate as to suffer any kind of similar injury, I know where to send them, trusting they will be in good hands.

I've worked with Ryan on two separate occasions and he was very helpful in both cases. He is very well versed in the practice of law and shows great professionalism. Ryan is approachable and empathetic which makes him a great attorney to work with. If I'm ever in need of legal assistance I won't hesitate to contact him again in the future.

I had the pleasure to know Ryann , he helped me deal with a case  with total professionalism, he was very measured with his honoraries and
always available to solve any doubts within the process.
Thank You .
sincerely  Juan Garduno

Loren is such a diligent and wonderful lawyer. I had two accident cases which I transferred to him as other lawyers were going nowhere with the case. That is the worst feeling in my opinion and it was a complete shift once Loren jumped on the case. He always responds to my messages and calls which helps get the case solved as timely as possible. The other party can add delays through more questionnaires/documents, but he rightfully proceeds through these and I'm grateful to how well he represents me in court. Providing documents and answers can take sometime on your part (especially if you have work/bills to catch-up on), but he is there by your side reminding you what he needs to get the case resolved. I find this level of connection with a lawyer rare and can't appreciate enough the work he has done for me. You're the best.

Having never been in a car accident, much less worked with an attorney on a settlement, Loren Schwartz was a dream to work with. He was kind and patient and definitely had my best interest. He made a stressful situation manageable. I would not hesitate to recommend him!

Loren is not the stereotypical personal injury attorney.  He is incredibly caring and compassionate with his clients, while not losing the edge he needs to defend them.  I've sent friends, family, and patients to him for their various legal issues after getting injured, and everyone is always so pleased with not only his exemplary service, but with his demeanor.  I find this aspect of his service to be so important -- people just do not feel good after an accident, and they need to be treated with care.

If you're not sure if you have a case, give Loren a call to run it by him. He will likely not charge you the hour it takes to review your case, and if it works out you will have scored yourself a really great attorney that YOU will be referring YOUR friends to.

During a difficult time, Ryan Dunn with his professionalism was welcomed. The years of experience from Ryan Dunn came through on my outcome of my case. I will always be thankful for this help and support. Turned a difficult time into a promising outcome. Thank you.

I recently used Ryan Dunn of Dunn and Panagotacos, he helped me with a FINRA expungement.  The level of service and communication exceeded expectations.  My issue was resolved quickly and professionally.   In short, Dunn and Panagotacos will be my goto firm going forward.  Highly recommended.

Gus and team thoughtfully and efficiently handled my case when I was rear-ended and suffered medical injury.  Gus was always proactive in making sure I was provided the options to make my case move smoothly and successfully through the process. He worked together with me to determine the strategic outcome that would be most successful and he achieved it without going to trial! I was very pleased with how he turned a very painful situation into a just reward.

August passed away on Oct. 15, 2013, as a consequence of the way he was delivered. I detail UCSF's mismanaged birth and Hersh & Hersh's, and particularly Charles Kelly's, disastrous handling of the legal case in my book, A LIFE BEYOND REASON: A DISABLED BOY AND  HIS FATHER'S ENLIGHTENMENT, published in 2020 by Beacon Press.

reviews.ownerResponse:
We are saddened to read this feedback. We utilize a team approach to ensure every case benefits from the collective experience of our staff, partners, and shareholders.

Our general approach to case value is that it is strictly determined by evidence and medical records. Sometimes, as we gather the full scope of evidence, the data reveals a value lower than what was initially hoped for. Delivering such news is a difficult conversation, and we always aim to explain those mechanics with the utmost clarity.

On the trial front, we view it as our duty to protect our clients financially. While the decision to go to trial is ultimately the client's ('we advise, you decide'), we will strongly recommend against it if we believe the risk of a low verdict, or losing entirely, would leave the client in a worse position than the settlement.

Because this review is posted under an initial, we cannot locate a file that matches these specific details. However, we pride ourselves on a hospitality-first approach and want to make sure everyone feels heard. Please reach out to our office directly so we can understand exactly what happened. If we dropped the ball on service, we want to know.

Cooper Law firm saved my life.  I had a bad bicycle crash a few years ago.  From the crash I developed five major injuries and illnesses.  I tried to keep working but the injuries kept me holding down a job.

I believed the crash was due to a faulty bike component.  Cooper Law agreed to take my case and Andrea stepped in to help.  She was amazing.  Not only did she prepare an excellent case, with all the needed expert witnesses and documents, but she determined that there may have been exemplary damages  involved.

We were nearing our trial date and trying to get the defendants to settle when the Judge informed us the case would be delayed due to trial back-log.  I was depressed and sad.  I needed the settlement to get the medical care I needed and to pay my bills as I could not hold down a 9-5 job.

Suddenly the next day Andrea called with great news, she had negotiated a settlement.  A really good settlement.

I am very thankful to Andrea, Miles and Maryanne Cooper, Kay, and the rest of the great team at Cooper Law.  They really did save my life.  Or at least saved me from a painful and homeless future.

Sincerely, TK.

reviews.text:
Three years ago, I found myself in need of a personal injury attorney, and I was fortunate enough to end up in the capable hands of Robert Igleheart. Think of him as the Sherlock Holmes of attorneys—brilliant, empathetic, fiercely dedicated, and with a knack for turning zealous advocacy into an art form.
Now, as an attorney myself, I know we’re the absolute worst clients—like trying to please a cat with a cucumber. But Robert blew me away. He strategized like a grandmaster, always five moves ahead, and he never budged from his meticulously planned positions. Every step was a masterstroke. No one dreams of needing an attorney, but when you do, the last thing you want is an amateur who’s just in it for the cash. So if you’re still reading this…why are you still here?! Stop, drop, and roll  straight to Robert Igleheart. Seriously, he’s the legal superhero you’ve been searching for!

reviews.text:
Like many other cyclists, this was my first hit & run.  I'll spare you the details but suffice to say that the experience left me feeling dehumanized, unimportant and "less than". I posted my experience on Facebook for all my fellow cyclists to be aware and left it at that. One of my cycling friends reached out and encouraged me to seek Miles Cooper's advice.
After much hesitation, I finally did. It didn't take long to get a call back and I'll never forget how caring the experience was and I felt "heard".
I went through the onboarding process which was thoroughly explained to me. Meghan was assigned to my case and that's when things really took off.
Meghan aggressively worked on my case and the results were literally faster than both the police department & the DMV could provide. (Still haven't heard from either of them).
I always knew what the current status of my case was because her updates were timely, concise and clear.
She kept me in the loop on every single step and even consulted with me on options when they arose.

There are not enough words for me to describe how incredible this experience was in restoring my self worth.
My initial goal was simply to not let the suspect feel like he got away with disrespecting cyclists and treat us like
we're sub-human.  Thanks to Miles, Meghan, Destiny and the Coopers LLC team, I was able to achieve that and more.

As a bonus, they were able to resolve the case incredibly fast.

I rarely write reviews but this team is one that I very highly recommend and they have my complete trust in knowing that
they have my back and they absolutely will fight for the best options for your case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Chris, thank you for such a detailed review. We're honored that Miles, Megan, and Destiny could help you feel heard and valued again. Your trust means everything to us.

reviews.text: I feel very fortunate to have been supported by the team at Coopers with a compensation claim. reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ A Truly Exceptional Attorney — Thank You, Lauren

After our family was rear-ended and our van was completely totaled, we were overwhelmed, shaken, and unsure of what to do next. From the moment we reached out to Lauren, everything changed for the better. She stepped in with confidence, compassion, and an incredible depth of expertise that immediately put us at ease.

Lauren handled every step of the process with professionalism and genuine care. She made sure we understood our rights, kept us informed at every turn, and fought hard to ensure we were treated fairly. What impressed us most was how she balanced sharp legal skill with warmth and humanity — we never felt like “just another case.”

Thanks to Lauren, we were able to navigate an extremely stressful situation with clarity and peace of mind. She secured outcomes we never could have achieved on our own and made sure our family’s needs were front and center throughout.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is dedicated, knowledgeable, and truly invested in her clients, look no further than Lauren Meisel. We cannot recommend her highly enough. She turned a difficult experience into one we could get through with confidence, and we are deeply grateful for her help.

Instead of spending $400 on the fine, I ended up paying the $400 fine plus $500 for their services, a total of $900, when I should have only spent $400 on the fine. In short, I don't recommend them at all; they just take more money from you. It's better to wait until you receive the total amount due for the fine, which will be much cheaper, and simply pay the traffic ticket without acquiring their services.

If you are facing a complex legal situation and need someone who will fight for you with heart and skill, I wholeheartedly recommend Austin Fish.
