I'm so grateful to the expertise and kindness of Tom Brandi and Austin Fish, the lawyers who handled my case after a serious accident caused major injury and years of subsequent surgeries. I knew I was in good hands and can't imagine having gone a different way.

At age 22, after graduating from UC Berkeley, I was brutally mauled by a rottweiler dog.  After numerous reconstructive surgeries, and a diagnosis that told me I would basically never work again, I met Mr. Brandi.  I had met with numerous attorneys, none of whom held a candle to Mr. Brandi.  After the dog owner tried to say the dog wasn't his and I had been told I wouldn't walk again...  every attorney wanted my case because insurance had already offered me money.  Mr. Brandi was the only attorney who read the police report and saw right away that my pepper spray had failed me.  The pepper spray had been guaranteed to work on dogs, but ended up having a faulty design which led to the failure.  NO OTHER ATTORNEY SAW THIS.  He fought for me at the worst time of my life and boy were they sorry.  Now, 20 years later, I remain eternally grateful to Mr. Brandi who, I'm lucky to call a friend.  I can never repay him for what he did for me, but I can certainly write a review.
Very professional and understanding.

reviews.text:
I highly recommend The Hassell Law Group. My family and I had the most exceptional experience with this amazing law firm.
After my 14-year-old son was hit by a vehicle while crossing the road, he suffered a traumatic brain injury that profoundly changed his life. Throughout his recovery, Dawn and her team demonstrated both creative legal strategy and genuine compassion. Despite my 20 years of professional experience in the insurance industry, I knew I needed an expert team to handle the complexities of his bodily injury claim so that I could focus entirely on his care. I specifically chose this firm after seeing the meticulous detail of their work in a previous case where they successfully sued one of my own insurance clients for max policy coverage limits.
The litigation process for a serious injury is never easy, but the firm navigated every obstacle effectively. They managed insufficient coverage issues, handled medical airflight invoice disputes, and coordinated with specialists to evaluate my son and ensure our health insurer remained honest. Their foresight covered critical details that I would have overlooked on my own.
Ultimately, they secured the maximum limits from the opposing insurer, negotiated down a significant medical lien, and presented a powerful case against our uninsured motorist umbrella policy. Thanks to their dedication, my son is now financially secure for his future on a great path to a full recovery.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much, Domingo, for sharing your family’s experience and for your very thoughtful recommendation. We are truly honored that you entrusted Attorney Dawn Hassell and our entire legal team with such an important and deeply personal matter.

We understand how devastating a traumatic brain injury can be for both a child and their family, and we’re grateful to know that our legal strategy, attention to detail, and compassion helped support you during such a difficult time. Your perspective and professional background make your feedback especially meaningful, and we greatly appreciate your recognition of the care and diligence our team brings to complex, high-stakes personal injury cases.

It was our privilege to advocate for your son and to work toward securing his future while allowing you to focus on his recovery. On behalf of everyone at The Hassell Law Group, thank you again for your trust. We wish your son continued healing and every success on his path forward.

reviews.text: This law firm and its lead attorney Dawn Hassell recently handled my son's case. They did an exceptional job. My son was hit by a car in Santa Cruz while on his e-scooter and broke his neck. There were no witnesses and he did not realize he needed to get a police report. He did not realize he was hurt so bad. Shock from adrenaline The other driver's insurance tried to blame my son. Our attorney not only made them accept full responsibility, she made them pay out the maximum amount possible, and swiftly. She was highly knowledgeable and very responsive. My wife and I were in a significant accident.  Within a few weeks the landscape became complex with bills, insurance companies and ongoing treatments.  While I have a technical background, these complexities were not familiar and would have been more than a full-time job to sort out.  The Hassell Law Group came highly recommended from another law firm with different expertise.  Engaging with HLG was simple and it was easy to get them spun up on our case.  Once we saw the straightforward valuable advice they were providing, we quickly agreed to become a client and have them represent us.

They explained to us in plain language what was important to the case, and what was important for our physical recovery.  It was comforting to know they truly cared about our physical not just financial recovery.  They were very responsive and always willing to answer the many questions generated by my technical curiosity. The lead on our case left the firm because of the commute.  The transition was very well handled by the attorney leaving and those picking up the case.  There was never a time we felt the transition might adversely affect our case.  In fact, Dawn L. Hassell, HLG’s managing attorney, took over the lead on our case.  She was fully spun up before our first meeting and fully engaged until the resolution.  Even though she was traveling in the beginning to support her family with health concerns, she was always responsive and on top of the case.

The case was resolved and we received the maximum amount available from all insurance policies which was a substantial amount of money.  HLG’s background and familiarity with such cases allowed for resolution without trial or drawn-out disputes.  They were firm yet fair with the third parties allowing for resolution in the best possible time frame for such complex cases.

We have supreme confidence in their ability to handle such cases for us in the future should the need unfortunately arise.  We will most certainly reach out to them first for future law needs independent of area, because we trust that if it’s not their expertise then they will likely provide a solid reference.

We truly appreciate the support the Hassell Law Group provided us.  We very rarely write reviews but felt so positive about our experience that we wanted others to know about it.

While going through litigation is never a pleasurable experience, Ryan made it easy. He was calm, cool, and collected throughout--aggressive when he needed to be, but also pragmatic.

We highly recommend him to anyone looking for excellent legal assistance in the Bay Area.

I was fortunate enough to find Ryan long before we even had a case. We knew the landlord we’d eventually sue was mismanaging things and treating its tenants terribly, but it would be another 2 months before they’d actually break the law. Despite this fact, Ryan hung tight with us - closely watching every move, taking the time to answer every legal question and give moral support to hundreds of people (only some of which would become future plaintiffs) free of charge.

He has this incredible ability to make everyone feel heard and treat each person, not just the case. He took out all of the guesswork and made an emotional and chaotic 3-month situation feel like something we could actually get through. Ryan plays chess not checkers, he’s strategic in every move, doesn’t miss a beat, and manages to do it all humbly - even finding ways to make you chuckle along the way. He’s honest, compassionate, straightforward, and he’s exactly the kind of attorney you want when you’re going through times that seem insurmountable.

He told us it would take up to 3 years for our case to resolve and he was spot on. He made the case itself easy as pie to get through. If you’re looking for someone who will support you relentlessly, guide you with clarity, and fight intelligently on your behalf every step of the way, Ryan Vlasak is the attorney you want in your corner.

What could’ve been a nightmare became manageable, even hopeful, because of his dedication and expertise. Thanks to Ryan, we walked away not just with a legal win, but with a renewed sense of strength and validation. Can’t recommend him highly enough.

reviews.text:
This team is amazing. They are the real deal and I am grateful. Their kind and generous work to get me properly rated with the VA for my conditions is nothing short of spectacular. Especially Tory Turano (can’t say enough good things about Tory, he constantly soared above and beyond the call of duty - Awesome!), Homer, and John. These guys are heroes. Thank you!
I had struggled to get my medical conditions service-connected and properly rated for over 10 years. I did this on my own, in the dark, without guidance and I was perpetually frustrated, exhausted, and frankly, defeated by the VA denying my claims for over a decade.  It was a family friend who knew of my struggles and recommended I contact Unruh Law. That phone call changed my life.
This is a journey Unruh and team will lead you through the ups and downs of working through the nest of vipers that is the VA disability claims process - The people that work at the VA are mostly wonderful, the process is a wicked labyrinth. It is complicated and easy to make mistakes on your own - but Unruh Law works magic. I had submitted claims for over 10 years with no movement at all, and the first claim I processed with Unruh got me a C&P exam and eventually service-connection and a rating in a matter of months. They are champions of the little guy. I will always be thankful for what these hard-working gentlemen have done for me and my family.
Understand, this journey requires patience, they are a busy group and nothing about this process moves fast - it is the VA, but it is worth your time and effort.  Tory is incredible - honest, direct, compassionate, and very insightful, he is impressive and I’m so glad to have had the opportunity to work with him. Special thanks to Homer and John as well, you are warriors and do invaluable work for the veteran community.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi, Scott. Thank you so much for leaving us a stellar review!

reviews.text:
Afternoon everyone, just want to give a huge thank you to Unruh Law. Specifically Tory Turano. I called and asked if anyone can help my case. I was able to get comfortable and explain everything that has happened to me in the last 7 years after getting out. Being in and out of the hospital for my heart issues.

After they heard my story it took about a month in a half to 2 months for them to review my files. I have a massive file with the VA seeking treatment so don’t let that scare you. They did their homework and let me know about things that I didn’t know I could claim. They also took care of all the paperwork as we all know that is very time consuming.

After my file was reviewed I was in constant contact with Tory as he guided me through everything that needed to be done. Tory let me know I should be getting phone calls for my exams and they sure do call shortly after he told me.

Everything was very smooth. I have been seeking treatment since I left the Army. I thought my case was going to be a long shot but I made it and I can’t thank Tory enough.  I’m still in shock. The VA wouldn’t schedule me a C&P exam when I filed on my own. With the help of Tory they had me scheduled and I was seen.

I’m literally in disbelief and in tears. I have been fighting this battle for the last 7 years. Depressed and sad that I thought I did everything right. Always took care of my body. After I left the Army I started to just get sick and see my health deteriorated.

I would strongly recommend working with Tory if you get the chance. Never give up and continue to seek help.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi, Aaron. Thank you so much for leaving us a stellar review!

A brief background first. I’m a Baby Boomer with a successful family and business. My very first investment was a 40 acre piece of mountain property purchased in 1970. After the purchase (big mistake) I had the property surveyed. It turns out 8 acres infringed on our neighbors property. I tried to get the issue resolved amicably, but to no avail. Went to litigation (my first). Between court rulings and appeals we won. However, it took 6 years. It got to the point I didn’t care if I won or lost just to get it over with. Because of this experience I had never gone into any other ligation.
Fast forward 50 years. In 1979, my wife and I purchased a family cabin at a lake. Three years ago, with 100 mph winds a 3000 pound giant oak limb snapped, fell 25 feet and crashed through our roof causing severe damage. The insurance company sent an adjuster and offered a minimal settlement amount. Nothing even close to the bids to repair. After several months it appeared we were at a standstill. Because of my prior experience I was hesitant to go into litigation. I was referred to GENE HALAVANAU for legal advice. During the interview Mr Halavanau explained the various options. He listened to my concern about my past litigation experience. He had a very calming and reassuring presence about him. After looking at the options, the decision was made to pursue litigation. During the litigation process Mr. Halavanau was very accessible and kept me informed. I always felt he had our best interests in mind. Mr. Halavanau was able to secure a very, very adequate settlement. It was well worth the wait.
Hopefully, I never have to go into litigation again, but if I did the first person I would call is Gene Halavanau.

reviews.text: This law firm is an excellent resource for individuals/renters seeking guidance about what to do when the risk losing their home because of the landlord selling the property.

One day in my mail I found a letter from my landlords attorney telling me my landlord had filed a petition with the San Francisco Rent Board to raise our rent.  My roommate and I immediately went to the Tenants Union for counseling.  We met Jason Wolford who told us we had a good case, but should hire an attorney to represent us at the hearing.  Jason provided us with a fairly long lists of attorney.  We reviewed the list and determined that Wolford Wayne was the best fit for our situation.

Megan Johnson, an associate at Wolford Wayne, was the person Jason recommended. Megan represented tenants in buyout negotiations, affirmative wrongful eviction cases and Rent Board cases.   We met with Megan in person and we were impressed with her knowledge of our case.  Megan felt our landlord’s case was weak and once they saw the rebuttal she would submit to the Rent Board they may withdraw the Petition to raise our rent.  She clearly explained to us what information we needed to provide her to do her best in defending us at the Rent Board hearing. For various reasons that we do not understand and were out of our control the Rent Board took 6 months to schedule our hearing.  During this time Megan was in touch with both us and the rent board working to facilitate a speedy hearing and to discuss with us the various documents the landlord provided as evidence why our rent should be raised.

In the end, the landlord withdrew their petition to raise our rent 3 days before the scheduled Rent Board hearing. This was frustrating, but all is well that ends well.  Thanks to Megan Johnson we are now prepared to document our comings and goings and other information the landlord would twist to try and prove that we no longer lived in our apartment.

All around we could not ask for a more knowledgeable, goal oriented attorney who communicated with us in a timely manner in a way we could always understand.  Megan was perfect!  There is nothing I would ask her to do differently and without hesitation I would recommend her to anyone having the unfortunate experience of having to deal with the San Francisco Rent Board.

I had a great consultation with Piper Wheeler from Wolford Wayne about issues that I was having with my tenancy. In addition to offering me some excellent advice, she was also a great listener. I felt like she really understood the issue I was having, and that I could reach out to her again should my situation get more complicated. I left the meeting with a better understanding of next steps that I should take.

To say Daniel was helpful, would be an understatement. Daniel and his team have been very helpful, clear, and concise. Has made our lives for the better. His understanding and knowledge of our rights as tenants, made us feel at ease.
If you are looking for one of the best tenant lawyers, look no further. Daniel is the one for you. Thank you Daniel and team!

i had two phone consultations with Megan Johnson who was great! Very friendly, knowledgeable, and easy to work with. she made me feel a lot more comfortable about a stressful time, and helped me decide the best plan to proceed with my issue.
UPDATE: with Megan’s advice, i was able to sue my ex-landlord and WIN in small claims! She told me what to expect on my court date, how to prepare, and what laws to cite. I would highly recommend Megan to anyone who is having an issue as a tenant.

Everyone at Wolford and Wayne was super personable, easy to work with, and prompt with communication. They are both genuinely real people and also very professional, which is a combination I appreciate a lot! I can't recommend them highly enough.

Daniel Wayne is a fantastic attorney. I reached out to Wolford Wayne because I was having recurring problems with my apartment building. Daniel took the time to explain my options and lead me toward the best path forward. The entire time, he was kind and professional. He gave me actionable advice that led to a good outcome. I would highly recommend him and his team for any help with tenants rights issues.

Jason helped me in the hardest situation of my life. He and his staff, especially Melinda are kind, compassionate, and honest. He is a good guy and trustworthy attorney.
I highly recommend them.

The best attorney experience of my life.

I was had been living in a duplex for about 5 years when the conditions became so dangerous that I had to evacuate. Over the years there were issues my landlord had not addressed, but the final straw was letting someone move in who had an illegal business. There were repeated violent altercations between my downstairs neighbor and her clients, physical threats made to me and horrible verbal abuse to her children (I also suspected sexual and physical abuse). Police and Child and Family Services were called many times, not just by me, but the entire neighborhood. I was unable to concentrate on school and scared to leave or be inside my house. My neighbors and I begged my landlord to do something, but all he did was give hollow promises. When I left I wasn't sure if I would take action. I had moved into a safe apartment and that awful period of my life was over. However, when my landlord withheld my security deposit it added insult to injury. After a conversation with Daniel Wayne it became clear that there was some hope to not only get my security back, but to be compensated for other wrongs done to me.

Originally Alex Merchant was assigned to my case. He was with me through the deposition of my landlord. Daniel took my case for settlement negotiations. The whole time Allison, the paralegal, was my main point of contact. Everyone was incredibly knowledgeable, responsive, patient and persevering. There were times it was hard for me to revisit the past. Not only was I busy with school and work, but that time was so traumatic that I found myself avoiding it mentally and having difficulty remembering. Allison felt like a supportive friend. She normalized my mental state and helped ease me into doing my part for a successful and just outcome to the case. Alex was an experienced instructor and guide during my deposition. I was a little nervous when Alex moved on and Daniel took on my case. However, I soon found out that Daniel cared and understood how to handle my case. Daniel was brilliant and assertive during the settlement negotiation.

Deciding to give Wolford Wayne a call was one of the most life altering decisions I ever made. WW won a sizeable settlement for very serious wrongs done to me by my landlord.

Thanks to the settlement, I was able to afford to back to school for a graduate degree without going into extreme debt. Though there's no amount of money that can undo that traumatic period in my life, it did help to create the conditions of healing by giving me safety, options and choices.

Jason, Melinda, Martha and everyone else on the team were exceptional. I feel so lucky to have been referred to Jason because he really went above and beyond for my case. If you are looking for a team of hard working individuals with your best interests in mind and who will fight tooth and nail for you, seriously look no further. Thank you to everyone who assisted me and a special thank you to Jason.

I can’t say enough good things about the entire staff at Wolford & Wayne.

Jason is a very experienced, top of the line, lawyer. He has a truly welcoming demeanor & confidence that you can trust.

The law firm recommendation came through a friend that grew up in San Francisco’s Bay Area. So it was comforting to know that Jason has a positive history and reputation. When we met with Jason, he clearly identified that we had a case and was upfront about the chances of winning.

After dealing with such uncertainties leading up to hiring Jason he made sure that we felt comfort in the fact that justice would be served and was swift with giving us clear direction on how to move forwards with our living situation. Cannot put a price tag on how that made us feel having a new born and dealing with an unexpected legal issue.

Megan, an associate of Jason’s firm, was  dedicated from the beginning. Her thoroughness was impressive and I must say, “she’s all business” in the best way. We appreciated that Megan was transparent on our expected outcome. In the end, her determination helped us come to a settlement that we felt good about. She really bridged the gap between lawyer and person & we never felt out of the loop.

Melinda, the office manager, who supported all of our paperwork interactions, was always very friendly, professional and very responsive as well.

If you have an issue with your current living situation, whatever it may be, do your homework, and if you feel you need a lawyer to protect the large investment you have made to live in San Francisco, we highly recommend to hire the the firm, Wolford & Wayne. You will get everything possible out of the case you have.

He’s an intelligent and knowledgeable lawyer and choosing him as your attorney is a choice you will not regret ! If i ever would recommend an attorney to someone or if I ever needed an attorney again in the future, Pezhman would definitely be a first choice !

Positive: Professionalism, Quality, Responsiveness

in 2021 I unfortunately was arrested for a DUI after a night out. While my BAC wasn't terribly high and there was no accident or anyone hurt, it still resulted in a traumatic experience overall for me as this was my first offense of any kind. I asked a friend for help and he recommended to reach out to the Pakneshan Firm to help me with my case.  As I had no idea how this whole process worked, Pezhman was very clear and patient explaining the next steps on how to navigate the complex court and DMV processes. One main thing that I appreciated the most was that he was super responsive via phone or email so that helped me feel more comfortable throughout.  Long story short is the he managed my case in a timely manner, I finished my probation , and then worked with him to get my record expunged so that I could go back to normal and put this behind me.  Definitely a lawyer I trust and would recommend to friends/family if they were in this same situation.

Mr. Pakneshan is a great attorney with a vast amount of knowledge and experience. He was able to answer all my questions in a timely matter and listened to all my concerns with a professional attitude. I highly recommend his services.

Pezhman is a good man! He's very bright, and a very sharp and helpful lawyer. Pezhman worked with me regarding a very serious legal matter, and I could not have asked for a better attorney. I highly recommend him for criminal defense matters.

When I needed help to protect my integrity that was being attacked in a frivolous request for a civil restraining order, Mr. Pezhman Pakneshan immediately engaged within minutes of my initial call. He walked me through the process, what I would expect, and we discussed why the claim was not legitimate.
He guided me through responding to the allegations, in obtaining a continuation from the court so we could do our du diligence, and submit a legal brief and response declaration that was concise and laid out factual information that discredited the claim.

He worked closely with me throughout what is an extremely stressful situation for anyone, and although I knew I did nothing wrong, you never really know until a judge looks at the facts and decides. In this case the facts spoke clearly and the request for a civil restraining order against me was denied.

I greatly appreciate the effort Mr. Pakneshan applied to my case, his communications with me along the journey, and his presence next to me during the hearing. The outcome was going to be based on our preparedness, the facts, and having truth on our side, he helped present all those elements.

Pehzman was very straight forward and honest about everything through out. I retained him for an expungement case. Everything was very seamless and I didn’t need to appear in court. He appeared in court on my behalf. Take Pehzman and you wouldn’t be disappointed.
He do a good job on my case. I would recommend Atty Pakneshan  to represent me again if I needed him. I love that he response right away  when I have question. It’s a 5 star service.
Excellent and knowledgeable service provided by the Pakneshan Firm. Achieved our goals in a very quick manner and was a pleasure to work with. Very highly recommended.
Extremely responsive, courteous and professional. Answered all questions and explained process very well.
I was referred to Pezhman from one of his previous client. He was super helpful in my case and was always available for my questions. I would definitely recommend his for any of your needs!

Nothing but good things to say about Mr. Pakneshan. He always makes time to answer any questions you have and is very knowledgeable and professional. He did a great job handling my cases and I would highly recommend him for anyone looking for a lawyer, his rates are very reasonable as well.

I would recommend the Pakneshan Law Firm without hesitation. They were quickly and efficiently responsive to my initial query, and the original consultation I had with Mr. Pakneshan was very informative and helpful. I ended up hiring him, and he produced the result I sought quickly, directly, knowledgeably, and professionally. Easy five star rating.

I highly recommend The Pakneshan Firm. I needed someone to handle a legal issue for me, and the firm replied almost immediately. They offered very reasonable rates, were very informative about the process, communicative throughout, and achieved success. I'm very pleased!

Attorney Pezhman is professional, responsive, and knows what he is doing. I am especially appreciative of his patience in explaining the legal process throughout. I would confidently recommend him to those seeking legal defense!

David is a best-in-class attorney -- outstanding skill while still retaining a practical approach, and offering excellent value. I'm grateful for every legal matter I've brought to him. Thank you again to David & the VLP team.

I’ve worked with David and his team on several corporate matters, including business structuring and investment agreements, and the experience has always been excellent. He is a highly knowledgeable business attorney with a practical, solutions-oriented approach and a deep understanding of startups and scale-ups.

Reccently called and spoke with someone named David to inquire about potential help with my situation. During the call, I happened to mention that I live in a rough neighborhood. To my surprise, the first thing he said in response was that he doesn’t personally handle these types of cases, but if he refers me to someone who does, it’s going to cost me $600–$700.

The comment came off as incredibly unprofessional and presumptive. David doesn’t know me or my financial situation, yet it felt like he made an assumption about my ability to pay based solely on where I live. I reached out hoping for guidance, not judgment.

This kind of interaction was disappointing and left me feeling dismissed rather than supported. I hope this feedback is taken seriously so that others aren’t met with the same type of response.

Hello we were very fortunate to receive a referral to David and Aubrey. Our transaction was very complicated and very detailed as you can imagine. David was great in representing us and navigating through all the legal language that was directed to us in closing the transaction. He would give you his expert opinion with the pros and cons. He would leave it up to us for the final decision. We’re very satisfied with David and Aubrey and the team.
I definitely would recommend them.
TG

David is an exceptional startup attorney whose thorough review of our bylaws and corporate documents gave us complete confidence in our legal foundation. Even with the help of AI tools, his expertise was essential — he caught important details we would have missed and provided clear, practical guidance that made the process smooth and stress-free.

David provided exceptional legal counsel during my startup's exit process. His deep understanding of the startup ecosystem and exit strategies was immediately evident. He didn't just explain my options; he proactively anticipated potential roadblocks and presented creative solutions. David's negotiation skills were crucial in securing favorable terms for all parties involved, demonstrating both his legal acumen and his ability to foster collaborative outcomes. He was consistently responsive, transparent, and provided clear, actionable advice. I wholeheartedly recommend David to any startup founder navigating the complexities of an exit. He is a strategic partner, not just a lawyer.

David has been our startup attorney and has been instrumental is understanding founder related rights which includes fiduciary responsibility, corporate law as it pertains to founders. Right from founder agreements all the way to exit, David has the right expertise and provides sound advice. He truly cares about the founders. Last but not the least, David is extremely well connected with folks who are experts in Delaware law, debt, employment and any gamut of corporate and state laws. You want to retain David as counsel if you are going to have a startup. Period.

Best Attorney! For any business agreement and corporate needs.
I am very happy with David and his team , they are just priceless assets in our team.
Thanks again for your service.

I had a great experience working with David and his team. I was pleased how quickly and easily I was able to establish my LLC. I intend to use him for any more needs around my new operation going forward.

David and his team have been a huge help to our start-up. We knew we needed a really talented business attorney, but his knowledge of company structuring has been critical along the way as well. I'd recommend David and his team to anyone and really look forward to our continued work together.

We have worked with David Goldenberg and the VLP Law Group for a few years now. They have worked on numerous projects for us spanning from M&A and debt documents to commercial agreements. They are an excellent business attorney and we will continue to use them and highly recommend them for other businesses.
I hired David as a business attorney for help on commercial agreements and David was a part of the success of the project.
Very professional and efficient startup/ business attorney! Guided us through many common corporate procedures with minimal headache.
David is a very experienced and practical business attorney. I have worked with him regarding corporation matters as well as providing executive representation.

Highly recommend David and his team. We used them as general business attorneys (outside corporate counsel) and in a more specialized role with the sale of the company. David and his team are detailed and efficient, a real pleasure to work with.

David and his team were the corporate representatives for our firm with a Private Equity transaction we were doing. They were knowledgeable, responsive, and had clearly done a number of these transactions.  They guided us every step of the way.  David is clearly a business attorney with a wide range of experiences.  I would recommend him for whatever corporate transaction your company needs help with.
David and his team did an amazing job of guiding us through the legal set up of our new corporation.  From minting shares to our incorporating.  They were great.

I have used David for my startup's representation as our business attorney and my experience has been superb. I have worked with a number of attorneys and David is my choice going forward for business representation. He is entrepreneurial and willing to think outside the box.

David has years of Silicon Valley experience as a business attorney both as part of a large corporate legal firm as well as his own firm VLP Law Group. He does all my business contracts and supports my clients with M&A, legal formation and capital raising. He's my go-to for all legal matters.

I've worked with David and his team through 3 startups now, and will use again when I do another! Extremely professional and thorough, have tons of advice and experience, and are significantly more budget friendly than most other firms I'd engaged with in the past. Also David has access to colleagues with expertise across so many other domains, so its a full service firm, but with a highly personalized, hands-on feel.

David and his team have been guiding us through the startup phase of our business. His representation of our company has saved us from making costly mistakes that could materialize down the road. Having David as our business attorney has allowed my partner and I to focus on what really matters, growing the business and not so much on the legal aspects of things. We have worked with other attorneys in the past and none have given us the time to explain things nor made us feel as comfortable navigating legal matters as David and his office has. We have recommended him to others in our field.

David and his team are my "Go To" fellow attorneys not only in terms of recommending them for my clients, but also to help me understand personal stock and investment issues.  David is awesome - HIGHLY recommend!

We were seeking a US based business attorney for corporate representation. VLP was recommended by our UK law firm and VLP have not disappointed. Being easy to deal with, responsive, very helpful and great value too.

Very impressed with the professionalism and speediness of David Goldenberg and his team of attorneys with setting up my corporation. Would highly recommend as a business attorney or for corporate representation.

I engaged David as a business attorney to create a contract for my consulting practice and a legal agreement in a sensitive situation. In both matters, he provided creative, practical and responsive counsel and solutions. I enjoyed working with David and recommend him highly. I will call upon him again.
I recently used David and his team as investor counsel and the results were excellent. His deep experience as a Silicon Valley business attorney was invaluable. VLG is now my go-to law firm.

David and his team provided my company a great support in order to launch it and count on the proper legal documents and contracts, including those needed for investors.
As co-founder of a Start-up it's always important to have someone like David to provide you the right founder representation even more when you are a newcomer to the start-up scene as I was a few years ago.
They are very professional, responsive and have a deep knowledge of Start-ups' needs.
I'm not a co-founder any more and time has gone by since then, but it's never too late to provide an honest and well deserved review.

David Goldenberg is terrific at providing entrepreneurs the ideal blend of business savvy plus legally astute guidance. He is the best business attorney we've worked with and has helped us with financing agreements, strategic direction, intellectual property and governance advice, among others. We also appreciate how responsive David and his team are, always making themselves available to answer questions and provide good advice.

Without setting a p-value, we probably have a statistically-relevant sample set of law firms that we interact with. David and team are awesome to work with. They are very responsive and always get you docs that are 'ready to sign' either by yourself, your investors and/or your customers. VLP is a great startup attorney and has done an amazing job on both our corporate efforts along with our customer-facing efforts. We look forward to building our business with VLP as our primary counsel.

I've relied on David as my startup attorney for formation and other corporate matters, and I've been very happy working with him. As a first time founder, I don't have much experience and confidence in navigating some of the issues involved. David and his team have always done a great job of educating me through these issues by breaking them down into whats important and where my blind spots are. I'd highly recommend other founders to work with them!

For a business attorney to review commercial agreements, you can't do better than David Goldenberg and his team. David is passionate, detail oriented, and very experienced. I also highly recommend him to startups that have to create securities agreements related to fundraising for seed, Series A, and later rounds.

David and the VLP team have been a steady, trusted hand as Neo Prime's business attorneys, from corporate formation to Founder representation to IP and trademark protection to investor negotiations.  We have benefitted enormously from his early stage expertise and guidance, coupled with his patient listening skills, to hone in on the essential points and to execute rapidly the best gameplan.  An awesome experience!

David has given me great service, and has done a beautiful job of being a translator between the language of law (his specialty) and the language of design (my specialty). I reached out when I needed to upgrade my client agreements and contracts. David was sensitive to by small-biz budget, and delivered exactly what I needed.  His sense of humor and practical nature made the process smooth and un-intimidating.

David Goldenberg is my go-to for all things corporate and start-up.  I have referred some of my best clients to David knowing that they are getting the best lawyer around.  I recently referred a very close colleague to David to ensure that his interests were protected and David did an amazing job protecting him.  I highly recommend David and can say without hesitation that he is the best, sharpest business transnational lawyer around.

David a great business attorney for growing companies and founder representation.  David has experience in all aspects of what a startup company needs.  He is also a great sherpa for the venture capital financing process.

David has a deep knowledge of the many issues facing early stage companies, including financing events, contracts, negotiations and other corporate legal matters. He provided training for our staff on the highlights of these areas and gave practical and prudent advice and solutions. He's a great listener, intelligent advisor, and a thoughtful business partner.

I have worked with David several times over the years on matters relating to founder representation and start up companies. David is an excellent attorney. Clearly an expert in his field; David is a Class A business attorney who brings a tremendous amount of experience to the table, greatly benefiting his clients.  I am extremely confident when I refer clients his way.  He knows what he is doing.
I found David in my search for a business attorney.  He has provided quality expertise and advice.  I'd feel very comfortable recommending him for anyone in a similar situation.

Truly a "founder's best friend" David and team are a triple threat: skills, speed and experience.  These navy seals have helped us immensely with our company structuring, venture capital investments and they are negotiation ninjas with business agreements!
Great and affordable founder representation -- highly recommended.

David has been ready to go and consistently available to us for any corporate or business agreement needs we've had throughout our startup's developments and is mindful to make the process efficient without going through too many back-and-forth steps. He's also a great relationship builder and, in contrast to other experiences we've had, is focused on long term results and not out to bill every minute which helps startup founders feel rooted for and cared about.

David Goldenberg provided excellent counsel on two different acquisitions. In one particular instance, the acquiring company's attorney made a strongly-worded, unreasonable demand. As I sat formulating a response, David immediately jumped in, explained very clearly why the demand was completely unreasonable, and shut down the opposing attorney so effectively that he never brought up the issue again (and was much more reasonable for the rest of the negotiations). I've continued to use David and his team to represent me on numerous startup matters. David provides logical options, clearly articulates risks, and helps me get business done (where some other attorneys seem so bent on avoiding risks that nothing gets done). I recommend him wholeheartedly.
Good firm for VC/PE advise

David has provided invaluable professional and legal advice to startups covering IP issues and counseling entrepreneurs and founders of firms on sensitive legal topics.  Very responsive and knowledgable.

David is incredibly knowledgable on IP issues and founder counseling. He articulates his concerns and considerations very well, in a way that allows for clear decision making and risk assessment. An absolutely excellent counsel to work with and would do so again.

David was our contracts and commercial lawyer for 4 years for my startup. He helped us develop standard templates for our NDAs, consulting agreements, contractor, agreements and other documents. David was directly involved with our negotiations with Fortune 100 companies to hammer out business agreements often with sticky items to resolve around IP indemnity, caps on damages, ownership of IP, infringement language, etc.  I found David to be an invaluable resource, a great business partner, and one of the reasons that we ran a successful business.

Among the most significant steps new startup founders make in developing into experienced founders is coming to understand that their company's legal paperwork is of paramount importance (in contrast with a small business, for example). As a startup attorney myself who has perhaps reviewed the corporate and other legal paperwork of more startup companies than nearly anyone on the planet, I have developed a deep, deep appreciation for how close to impossible it is for startup founders to know they are working with a great startup attorney.

Startup founders working with David can rest assured that they are working with a great startup attorney.

David is a terrific attorney, and I highly recommend his services to any growing business that is looking for top-notch, timely and reasonably priced legal advice and assistance. He is knowledgeable about all aspects of corporate representation and venture financing, and has acted as principal outside counsel to a large number of startup companies in a variety of industries.

I’ve had the privilege of being able to use David as my go-to attorney in connection with several startups with which I’ve been involved, and I’ve been highly been impressed with the depth of his knowledge, the thoughtfulness of his approach, the clearness of his communication, and the practicality of his real-world advice. If you select David as your legal counsel, you have made a wise choice.

I am an attorney. Whenever my clients need an excellent corporate lawyer for business agreements, corporate transactions, mergers and acquisitions, stock and options transactions, startups, and business advice, I send them to David Goldenberg. They always receive great service and advice.

David has been an exemplary Corporate Lawyer for our high-end San Francisco based catering company helping us explore various corporate structures and business agreements that have enabled us to implement successful long term strategies and hire key employees.  He is very easy to work with and extremely responsive to any needs or questions we have.  I highly recommend him!

I was exposed to asbestos during my military service. I hope today's conversation with your company will result in a positive outcome. My conversation with today's representative was very positive and will see where it goes from here. Thanks.

They are very willing to help you and answer everything you ask and they are the first ones willing and wanting to help me threw this stuff after losing my kids dad and explain everything in detail to me . Thank you

Everyone I have talked with at Simmons Law Firm has been wonderfully kind.  I am appreciative of their listening as I have a hearing impediment and had to ask them to repeat what they said a few times.  They did so and were very patient with me.  Thank you.

Simmons Law Firm is kind, efficient and excellent in their work.

Please do not be afraid to contact them if you have a legal situation that they might be able to help with.
They will answer your questions to their best ability.

They are a fine law firm.  I appreciate them very much and thank them.

Valerie
Solid law firm that you can trust to meet your needs.
Easy process for intake information and getting connected
So far it has been good just getting started

I just spoke with Tia regarding a potential need.  I left the call feeling like I had connected with the correct firm for a large and complex public safety accident that had been hiden for years.  They lied, and we died.  Had they told us we would have been monitored.  Instead, we named areas near the plant, like Cancer Hill was Humboldt Hill... downwind and up the hill.  My emotions were leveled and met with great concern.  Thank you, Simmons Hanly Conoy, for having Tia return my call for a follow-up.

Bard Port Catheter infection caused Sepsis and almost killed me. Had Catheter removed. Infected my pacemaker had to have that removed also. Another pacemaker implanted a week after infected one was removed. It was put on opposite side of my chest. Simmons Hanly Conroy so far have been great in getting a claim filed on my behalf !

Just finished my initial contact with Simmons.  Case Mgr. Kris M. was easy to understand; explained the process; was personable, and patient with me.  Before ending the phone call, he made sure that I had received all the emails he sent.  Plus he walked me thru an email procedure to make sure I did it successfully.  This is a good start to a difficult situation.  ..NOEL
It took some time, but they kept me up to date on the progression.  I was happy with the payoff amount.  It was worth the wait.

Initially I was approached by the firm with an offer to join in a class action suit. I accepted their offer and they handled the case from beginning to end. They were always in contact with me with updates on the case. I was very happy with the process. I strongly give a shout out to C. Gibbons from that firm.

When I developed my medical issue and trust me it was not a very pleasant one, I contacted five law firms and sent them all my medical records and only one came back and took my case. The rest said they didn't have enough for a case which I thought was ridiculous but then I'm not a lawyer. Five years later they settled, and it was over and done.
Expert legal representation.   Patient people to help with class action lawsuits.  I had no idea the amount of work went into a lawsuit.  Thank you.
Easy to talk to and they follow through with things. I did not have to worry about it. They are bulldogs when it comes to recovery but still have client concerns at heart.

This firm wasted my statue of limitations with lies and deceit. My settlement offer was a measly 22k before their 40% and other fees. They are very rude when asking questions, and very unhelpful. There was only one lady that I spoke with that was polite months and months ago and her name is Stephanie, the other two, Marcia and Linda are very rude and demeaning. Save your case for a firm that truly cares and doesn’t take advantage. Hope this review reaches someone of importance in their firm.

Mr James Ackerman's legal expertises are 100% the best in the legal field
His assistant Gerald works deligently to make sure the process be follow without delays. If you or anyone you know needs legal representation as injured worker.. l recommend his legal office 100%.

James Achermann is an excellent workers comp attorney. He is very responsive to our concerns and the ongoing issues we've had with workers comp insurance not paying for prescriptions that their outside medical reviewer had approved. His paralegal, Gerald, is also on top of things.

He has talked to the insurance adjuster for over an hour to resolve issues and is working hard to settle my husband's case which involves a Medicare Set Aside. If you've been injured on the job, don't try to deal with workers compensation insurance companies on your own. They are not on your side and you need competent legal representation.

Joe represented me against a very powerful org., in a 10 year work comp case of great complexity and impact for all parties involved. He is the captain manning the wheelhouse in this dangerous reef strewn foreign sea, believe me, the medico-legal world is no place for amateurs. Joe is not an amateur. Ultimately it also involved a social security claim which Joe also prevailed over in my regard, and I am comfortably retired in large part due to this remarkable attorney. Thanks Joe.
Great costumer service and dedication to you as a person not a paycheck..  lots of information and details your if and but questions will be answered ....thanks Gerald and mr.waxmen for everything

I had an excellent experience working with Svetlana Shirinova and her team. They handled the complex aspects of my case with a high level of professionalism and expertise, and the entire process was smooth and well organized. What really stood out was Svetlana’s personal involvement and genuine commitment to achieving the best possible outcome. I truly appreciated the responsiveness, attention to detail, and support from the whole team. I would highly recommend Svetlana and her firm to anyone looking for knowledgeable and dedicated legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Maxim. We are happy to serve you!

reviews.text: I would like to recommend Svetlana as a competent specialist and professional in her field. I contacted her after my first car accident, when I had no idea what steps to take or what to do. Svetlana explained everything in detail, including the process, and took our case, even though it wasn't very financially advantageous. Svetlana managed to negotiate an increased payout with the insurance company, and I received my compensation.

I received a consultation from Svetlana Shirinova in the middle of my case with another attorney.  Svetlana found a solution which my attorney adopted and which resolved my case and changed my life for the better.  Svetlana cares about her clients like it is her family.  It is her caring that makes all the difference; you can count on her. Highly recommend.

Svetlana is completely incompetent! At the first consultation regarding my wrongful termination, which she postponed several times, she refused to accept all my facts, evidence, and witnesses, and said that I was entirely to blame and should be smarter in the future. I was simply shocked. Never again, as they say. Thank God I quickly found another competent lawyer and I'm working with him now, although I was ready to give up after the consultation with her
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Ms. Parfenova, my record of our short encounter two years ago is entirely contrary to what you have asserted. Nonetheless, I am glad you have found counsel to represent you and I wish you a speedy victory and success in all your endeavors.

reviews.text:
I am extremely grateful to attorney Svetlana Shirinova and her amazing team for their outstanding work on my car accident case. From the very beginning, Svetlana was professional, responsive, and truly cared about my situation. She explained everything clearly, answered all my questions, and kept me informed.
Her team worked perfectly and efficiently, and the results came fast, even better than I expected. I felt supported and confident knowing my case was in such responsible and experienced hands.
Thank you, Svetlana, for your dedication, hard work, and excellent results. I highly recommend Svetlana to anyone who needs a trustworthy and skilled attorney.

I am very grateful that Svetlana was on my case. She is very knowledgeable, sharp, and thinks fast. For her, this work is clearly more than just a job, it is her true calling, and she truly cares about helping people.
She quickly understood my situation, knew exactly what to do, and explained everything clearly. She was also very patient with me, explaining things multiple times and in simple terms to make sure I understood.
She is very strong in the courtroom and fights hard for her clients’ interests, like a bulldog. When I was looking for a lawyer, multiple people recommended Svetlana and I understand why.
Svetlana cares about her clients and has a very kind personality. She is attentive and always willing to help, even on weekends when something urgent comes up. This level of dedication is very rare. I have dealt with many lawyers in my life, and honestly, no one compares to her.
Svetlana is also very good at reading people and situations. She values honesty and straight communication.
I highly recommend Svetlana to anyone looking for a lawyer who is smart, honest and committed to her clients.
I've worked with Svetlana for over 5 years on a number of cases. She is known to solve problems and bring good luck. Even hopeless cases ended in victory. 🎯 Highly recommend!

I have known Svetlana for almost 10 years. She helped my family and my friends in difficult situations and always gave solid advice. Throughout her legal practice, she has always demonstrated professionalism, deep understanding and compassion. I'm so glad I took her advice. I can't recommend her enough.

An exceptional lawyer with true compassion and professionalism!

I highly recommend Svetlana Shirinova!
After almost 10 years of waiting for my immigration interview, Svetlana guided me through every step, prepared me so thoroughly that I walked into that interview knowing exactly what to do, and I WON my case.
From our first meeting, it was clear that Svetlana is not only highly experienced and knowledgeable, but also someone who genuinely cares about their clients. she always took the time to explain every step of the process, answered all my questions with patience, and made me feel truly supported throughout the entire journey. Svetlana is incredibly thorough, respectful, confident, and kind a rare combination that made all the difference for me.
Svetlana isn’t just a lawyer ,she’s a fighter, a strategist, and a deeply caring human being who actually gives a damn. She listens, she understands, and she’s relentless in getting results.
Whether it’s immigration, accident and injury cases, slip-and-fall, or wrongful termination- she handles every single detail with passion, precision and heart.
If you want someone who will fight for you like it’s her own life on the line, Svetlana is the BEST one.

Without any reservation I will highly recommend Svetlana Shirinova as a lawyer. She is smart,sharp, extremely knowledgeable and competent.
She is compassionate and supportive.
She listen and hear.
Svetlana will go above and beyond, working on your case,for the best possible outcome for you.
Her stellar reputation and vast expertise will put you in ease.
Thank you,Svetlana,for your help,guidance and professional advices.

I am very grateful to Svetlana Shirinova for all her help. From the very beginning, she made me feel safe and supported. She listened carefully, treated me with respect, and truly cared about my situation.
What impressed me the most is not only her professionalism but also her kindness. She explained everything in simple words, was always patient with my questions, and gave me confidence when I needed it the most.
Thanks to Svetlana, I felt that I was not alone. She stood by my side and guided me through every step. I would recommend her to anyone looking for not just a great lawyer, but also a person who really cares.

Cannot express enough how grateful I am to Svetlana Shirinova. She’s not only very knowledgeable and professional, but also incredibly attentive and responsive. What stood out the most to me was her compassion—she truly cared about my situation and I always felt supported and well-guided. Highly recommend her to anyone seeking legal help.

I want to sincerely thank Svetlana for her support and assistance during a difficult time. Thanks to her professionalism, attentiveness, and human approach, I felt much more at ease going through a difficult situation. I felt her concern and desire to genuinely help, not just "get things done." It's incredibly valuable to have such a reliable person by your side. Thank you so much! I highly recommend her if you find yourself in a difficult situation.

I called her unsolicited and she was very helpful from the get go, she did not ask for consultation but helped me and guided me through the first call. One of the best immigration attorneys in San Francisco.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow, thank you.  You are always welcome in my office.

reviews.text:
Svetlana Shirinova and her team are absolutely amazing! She got me the maximum compensation when other lawyers said I’d only get a fraction of that. She settled my case quickly, helped me find proper medical care, and was available to me any time of day.
If you want someone who will fight for you, get you real results, and genuinely care about your recovery, Svetlana is the attorney you need.

Hello, Latinx community. If you're looking for a free life in this country full of opportunities, but also of difficulties for us, Svetlana is definitely the one for you. She speaks Spanish, is straightforward, and very responsible. I met her a year ago, and after nine months, I received my green card thanks to her tremendous help and experience. This isn't an advertisement; it helped me and it can help you too.

Svetlana is an outstanding personal injury attorney. Her professionalism and expertise were evident from our very first meeting. She successfully handled our case with remarkable speed and efficiency, securing a fair settlement much faster than we anticipated. What truly set her apart was how accessible and responsive she was throughout the entire process – always available, quick to answer questions, and providing clear guidance.
