With the help of the experts here at this law firm, I was able to file an injury claim against the restaurant owner. My lawyer was able to quickly get me a fair recovery for my accident claim.

Looking back, I can honestly say that I am happy with my decision to contact this team for help with my accident claim. The team was able to really handle things effectively and quickly secure the settlement that I was owed.

On the off chance that it hadn't been for the assistance of my legal advisor, I truly don't figure I would have had the option to win my case. In only two or three months, this group figured out how to deal with my case really well and secure a fair prize. Many thanks, California Work Regulation Business Lawyers Gathering!

Deciding to contact this team for help with my car accident claim turned out to be the best thing that I could have done. In just months, my lawyer was able to handle things with the insurance company and get me a payout that turned out to be more than fair...
Thank you so much for taking care of my workers compensation claim! I really have no complaints about the process. My lawyer and the whole team really handled things effectively from start to finish.

Thanks so much for handling my workers compensation claim so effectively and helping me win. I really don’t know what I would’ve done without the help of this great team backing me up every step of the way.

Thanks for fighting for my rights and doing so much to ensure that I recovered the highest payout possible. I really don’t know what I would’ve done without the help of these guys fighting for my rights every step of the way.

It is very interesting to me that my lemon law claim wasn’t taken seriously until after I got representation. This team was able to really handle things effectively from start to finish and secure the settlement that I was owed. If I hadn’t reached out to this team, I really don’t think that my recovery would have been possible.

Thanks to the guidance that I was able to get with the guys here at this law firm, I was able to successfully pursue my claim and fight for my rights. This team is really the best there is. They were able to handle my lemon law claim effectively and quickly secure the settlement that I was owed.

This team exceeded all of my expectations and went above it all to secure the highest settlement available for my claim. Thank you so much for handling my case so well and making sure that I was fairly compensated for my lemon law claim.
Downtown LA group has the best lawyers in California. Hassan Halawi got my case settled quickly in a very satisfactory manner! I highly recommend downtown LA law group. ( Workers comp)

Contacting this legal team after my accident was truly a great decision. It was obvious my case would be in the best hands. My lawyer wasted no time and handled everything very well, leading to a fair resolution. Thank you!
Downtown LA Law Group

Thanks to the guidance that I was able to get from this team, my employment claim went smoothly from start to finish and I was able to recover a settlement that turned out to be more than fair. California Labor Law Employment Attorneys Group really handled things well.

In late 2023 I purchased my first small business, only to find that the seller had substantially misrepresented its financial status.

From the date that I assumed ownership of the business, operating expenses in each category proved to be 3-4 times higher than what the seller had advised through various documents provided and other representations made prior to the transaction. By underreporting operating expenses, the seller was able to represent the business as profitable when it was actually losing money by a significant margin.

I scheduled a consultation with Steven Sherman to assess if there was a basis for legal action. He wrote a demand letter to the seller, which was sent in mid-2025 after I had managed to sell off the business at a minimal price. While demand letters are often ignored, the seller did respond in this case and agreed to mediation.

Steve prepared an extensive mediation brief to summarize the case. The document was thorough and precise in addressing the misrepresentations that induced the transaction. We presented a strong case at mediation, and the opposing side agreed to a six-figure settlement amount.

Steve represented my case meticulously, and I was able to stand up to a dishonest and unethical business broker.
Steven was great to work with: right to the point, conscious of the time he spent on my case, and proactive. Worked with him on a short document review
We spent time searching for an experienced lawyer to assist our company in resolving disputes in the United States. Lawyer Sherman was patient, responsible, highly experienced, and reasonably priced.

I highly recommend Steve Sherman.  I hired him to review a work contract and had a great experience.  He was very knowledgeable, provided a prompt and thorough review, and identified specific areas of the contract to eliminate as well as how to negotiate compensation and equity.  He saved me a lot of agony in the long run.

It is my pleasure to highly recommend Steven Sherman at Sherman Business Law. I met him at a networking event and was immediately impressed by his clear and concise approach to legal matters. As ZealStrat was embarking on a significant collaboration with one of our partners, we needed expert legal guidance. Steven proved instrumental in helping us draft and finalize the collaboration agreement. He was incredibly upfront about the process, setting clear expectations from the start and consistently delivering on time. His diligence in analyzing every aspect of the agreement were remarkable, and he made what could have been a complex process feel smooth and efficient. Beyond his legal expertise, Steven is simply a pleasure to work with. I highly recommend his services to any business seeking top-notch legal counsel.

I am so grateful I was referred to Steven Sherman through a local small business resource. He is an outstanding lawyer who expertly guided me (and was my lifeline) through contract negotiations for an acquisition. His thoroughness, attention to detail, and deep knowledge of the law gave me complete confidence throughout the process. What really stood out to me was how much he genuinely cared about my business and its success and how he took the time to make sure I understood and was comfortable with every step. I wouldn't have gotten the deal done without Steve. Highly recommend!

I was referred to Sherman Business Law by another attorney to consult on an aggressive business agreement. Steven was fast, thorough, and professional throughout the process. I would recommend this law practice for anyone's legal business matters.

Despite his busy schedule, Steven accommodated my request to discuss the unethical business practices of a certain moving company. He was incredibly knowledgeable and supportive throughout our conversation, offering clear guidance on the next steps. I highly recommend Steven to anyone having legal issues with moving companies.

I knew of Mr. Sherman's excellent reputation in helping businesses in financially significant legal matters, so took a chance to ask his assistance with a personal situation which, though with fewer dollars at stake, was also important to me in terms of good neighborhood relations.  I was impressed with how quickly he responded, how well he listened to me and immediately grasped both the legal and interpersonal issues, and though obviously busy with more "major" cases quickly took action on my behalf in a most assertive yet professional manner.  In this instance presenting his thorough analysis of relevant case law dissuaded the other party from their intent to engage in costly litigation, and won for me a better resolution than I could have imagined in terms of my financial goals and, due to his style of engagement, unexpected respect and good will from the opposing party.  He's sharp as a tack, dogged in pursuit of his client's interests, and a warm and compassionate human being.

I came in for advice and ultimately a business divorce. I was a minority shareholder of a boba tea franchisor. The majority shareholders refused to disclose any financial information to me at all. They had no intention to and told me I did not need to know any of it. The majority shareholders asked me to sign a document indicating that I had received all important information for a transaction to buy me out, but the company and its founder refused to respond to any request to provide that same information. A letter to the company’s lawyer was also met with silence. The majority shareholders were just blowing me off. That is when I hired Steven, he is extremely easy to work with. Steven is honest and will give you the truth. He gave me the best legal advice. He explained thoroughly all options I had and the possible outcomes of my decisions. He is extremely professional, and he leaves no stones unturned. Long story short, he was able to help me get back my initial investments and a little bit more, as well as all attorney’s fees I had paid. The other party ended up having to pay for my attorney’s fees and costs as part of a judgment against them ordering key corporate information to be provided. The company and its founder ended up with liens against them. Steven’s work is beyond worth it with his experience, expertise and attention to details. I am extremely happy that I had the opportunity to have worked with Steven. I still email him all my future business deals to be reviewed before moving forward. I can’t stress how wonderful working with Steven and the quality of work he produces is. I hope he doesn’t ever retire!

We had a great experience with Sherman Business Law. We (a group of LPs) needed to renegotiate our incorporation documents, and Steve provided prompt feedback on terms we needed to address, was helpful in framing negotiation tactics, and patiently walked us through terms that we needed to understand. He was also able to keep within a tight timeline, which opposing counsel struggled with. I'm happy to say that we got our most important contractual concerns accepted and Steve helped us focus our time and budget on the most important issues. Overall it was a great experience and I wouldn't hesitate to work with Sherman Business Law again.

I had a business issue regarding a seven-figure investment. Thank goodness Steve Sherman was there to help me. Not only is Steve a knowledgeable and experienced attorney, but he genuinely cares about helping me achieve the best possible outcome. Knowing Steve is in my corner provides the calm, confidence, and peace of mind I need to handle whatever business or investment-related issues may come. Thank you, Steve!

I sought advice from Steve regarding a complicated investment agreement. Steve reviewed each part of agreement thoroughly and highlighted potential pitfalls, and ultimately preventing a potential complete loss for me.

On another occasion, I had an initial discussion with Steve about establishing a business entity for importing tropical fruits. It was great that Steve possessed previous experience collaborating with entrepreneurs in the food industry. Steve gave me an overview of what it would take to set up such business from legal standpoint. It was extremely helpful

Both consultations were informative and streamlined. Steve offered concise guidance and addressed all my inquiries without incurring excessive time charges. I look forward to working with him again in the future.

I am a Canadian business owner who was looking for a US lawyer to help with a vendor I paid upfront for goods and then he never shipped them.  I'd called a number of places and as soon Steven picked up the phone I knew he was the guy for me.  Honest, straightforward, knowledgeable and extremely personable not only did he successfully negotiate a refund for me but it was nice dealing with him while we were doing it.  He knows he always a friend in Canada now and I know I have a lawyer I can trust in the US.

I'm a Sydney based entrepreneur in the food & beverage industry. I had a dispute with a company in San Fransisco that failed to deliver my product and refused to return a $100,000 + down payment.

The level of professionalism and work ethics that was displayed by Steven is second to none, and needless to mention that he won the case for me and got me my money back.

Steven gave me an consultation on business issues and he was knowledgeable, efficient, and personable. I am an attorney myself and if all of us lawyers practice law as professionally as he does, we wouldn't have so many complaints and jokes about lawyers! I highly recommend Steven. He is a lawyer's lawyer!

Thank you attorney Sherman for your valuable insight at a generous and fair assessment of cost…. I do not know where I would be without your genuine kindness and intelligence. Attorney Sherman is very wise and will be honest above all, as to whether or not your circumstances are in your favor. Count on him for the perfect advice.

I needed a level-headed lawyer who had worked with food entrepreneurs and understood business divorces/corporate control issues. Luckily we found Steven who had the skills we needed. He was so kind and patient and really listened. He helped me stand up to the bullies and I feel good about how everything turned out in the end. I highly recommend Steven.

As a small business owner, I'm deeply grateful to Steve for his help over the years - from the smaller tasks to the big ones.  He has reviewed and drawn up contracts, and was of tremendous help in managing a professional dispute, bringing it to a positive resolution. Steve is professional, responsive, knowledgeable, and terrific to work with.

Steve helped me with my carport dealer services. he is attentive, and knowledgeable! He helped me with manufacturer’s contracts since I am a sales rep. for a few manufacturers. He also provided advice for concerns I had with clients and assisted me with making sure all my legal documents were up to date. I highly recommend him!
Steve was very helpful with our issue. We were referred to him by SFMade and we consulted with him about important agreements for our manufacturing business. The advice was valuable and informative.

Steve was awesome to work with and was able to schedule a late afternoon call to make up for the time difference (I am currently traveling internationally).  I chose him because of his excellent google reviews and he has lived up to my expectations.

I was referred to Steven by ManufatureSJ. As a small business owner/Entrepreneur I really appreciate his knowledge and helpfulness around my businesses needs (general corporate and employment issues for our two business entities). He was straight forward, not judgmental and let me know when I needed to consult others. I greatly appreciated his working style and communication.

I needed a lawyer to write a lease amendment with extra protections for me. I live in Scandinavia so I found Steve online. I told him I needed this done on short notice and Steve was able to deliver it earlier than I requested. I was also pleased and thankful to see he added in protections that I didn't even think about. Super pleased with Steve's work and professionalism and will definitely be returning if I need a lawyer again.
Steve Sherman returned my call when no one will. Thank you

Steven is a great guy. He helped me in a wierd situation,  i was having anxiety and he took control when needed. Worked me through the situation  with confidence and aplomb. I can reccomend his service with full honesty.

Steve took me through that hard time and made me feel at ease.
10/10
Very good guy. He answered my call, and provided excellent advice. Then he called me again for even more information!! Thanks again Sherman.

Steven was very helpful with the formation of my business. He was prompt to reply to my request for consultation, thorough with his answers, and fair with how he set and met expectations for our consultation time. Working with Steven was a refreshing experience. He's clearly very experienced and well worth the investment. I will be very pleased to work with Steven again in the future for any legal needs I may have as a small business owner.

I've turned to Steven periodically over the last 10+ years for legal help with my engineering business.  He helped me when I started my business to make sure all my paperwork was correct and to draft my professional services agreement. And he's always been able to help me when I have legal questions from time to time.  He's also a nice guy and easy to work with.  I would highly recommend him.

Steven Sherman is the best! He is knowledgeable, professional, honest, and kind. Initially, I had trouble finding an attorney who would represent me against a brokerage firm. Fortunately for me, Mr. Sherman took a chance and offered his help. His experience in financial law helped tremendously, and I would not have won my case without him.

I was referred to Sherman Business Law by SFMade for assistance setting up an LLC.  His work was thorough, timely and provided me with all the necessary information I needed! Steve Sherman was a pleasure to work with.

Several years ago, Mr. Sherman represented me in a dispute I had with a stock broker in Northern California. There were two other people I knew who had similar disputes with the same stock broker but they had DIFFERENT attorneys. The other two people went to arbitration and they LOST and got nothing. However, before my case went to arbitration, Mr. Sherman called and told me the stock broker wants to give you $50,000 to settle your case and I strongly encourage you to accept the settlement. I agreed and I am happy to report that of the three similar disputes, I was the only one who WON and got $50,000! Please remember - the choice of your attorney can make the difference between winning and losing. Mr. Sherman won my case. Thumbs up for Mr. Sherman.

Steve helped me set up an LLC. I really appreciate his solid domain expertise and that he explained thoroughly on which steps to take and why. Feeling much more relaxed after the process started. Highly recommend.

Attorney Sherman went out of his way to patiently and kindly explain all the issues regarding my case.  He knowledge is amazing.  He provided all the information I was looking for within a few minutes.  Attorney Sherman is well informed and provided all the documents and information that I needed.  He also made sure that the news regarding my case is delivered with compassion and a sense of humor.  I recommend him highly and will go back to him for other issues.

I was looking for some advice on transferring shares from partner to another and I called Steve to talk about it. He has a great way of communicating complex matters to a layman like me and made me feel like I was totally informed about the process. His follow-up was perfect, punctual and concise. If I ever need any legal advice on my company I will go straight to Steve. I highly recommend his services.

We just completed the sale of our company with Steven as our attorney. At all times Steven was dedicated, working hard, thoughtful, very protective, counseling superbly, and...a delight to work with. Bottomline...we were well-positioned and protected, and the process was efficient, cooperative, and dare-I-say fun. I have experience with acquisitions/sales, and found Steven to be a great fit.

I STRONGLY recommend Steven and his services. If you are considering him, feel free to be in touch for more information.

Steve recently consulted with me about some really important documents I was given by an institutional-sized customer. He was extremely helpful, and responsive to all of my inquiries. I left feeling much more confident and comfortable with my situation. At the end of our consultation I knew I had a new attorney for my business.. I highly recommend!!!

We interviewed a few other business attorneys, but chose Steve because of his experience and because he showed genuine interest (with the other lawyers, the consultations felt transactional). Steve was instrumental in helping us with a complex entity structure for our small business that wanted to grow. The work involved setting up a C Corp and issuing shares. Throughout the process, he proactively addressed issues, patiently answered our many questions, and replied to our calls and emails in a timely manner. We're glad to have found someone as hard-working as Steve. Would happily go back to him if we need an attorney again in the future.
Steven clearly explained the process and looked out for my best interests with a business negotiation.  Thank you!

Steve Sherman is the attorney that you want in your corner when faced with business litigation.  He is professional, thorough, responsive, sharp, determined and always on the ball, 2 moves ahead of the other side.  Steve accomplished a successful business divorce for me, which was extremely stressful at times.  His proficiency, attention to detail, and sure-handedness instilled calm confidence in me to the very end.

I don't generally need attorney services unless dealing with sensitive and unpleasant issues. Steven was very responsive and accessible. He took the time to discuss a past marital separation agreement and new stock option distribution agreement that were hitting a snag. He was patient and responsive on the phone and reviewed communications that I forwarded to him on email. He was clear about his availability and fortunately, I was able to resolve my issue before needing to engage his services. However, I consider him a resource and would reach out to him in the future. He was patient, considerate, thoughtful, responsive and showed integrity! All traits that I value that are unfortunately hard to come by. Good luck!

Needed to review a business contract in California, which is not easy to do, when you live in Western Europe. Sherman Business Law provided timely and useful advice, which helped me reach a decision to go through with the deal. Steven is thorough and practical in his approach. Certainly recommend!

Wanted to get some guidance on starting up a new online business, and got recommended for Sherman Business Law from a Nextdoor post. Steve gave me terrific advice, straightforward and concise. He's very easy to talk to, answers questions well, and cuts right to the chase about what's most important and what isn't. As a former lawyer, I'd wholeheartedly recommend Steve to anyone with business law questions, and I'll definitely engage his services again if I need legal counsel or advice.

I am based in Europe and hired Sherman Business Law to give me advice in relation to a LLC member dispute in San Francisco. We had several skype calls and numerous of emails over several months. His advice was very sound and informative on every communication we had.
I would not hesitate in using his services again and to recommend his company.

Mr. Sherman was referred to me by another lawyer because of his expertise in small business back in February 2016. I cannot praise Mr. Sherman highly enough for his business ethics, sense of fairness, integrity, honesty, passion, and hard work. He immediately focused on our trade secret dispute and gave it his undivided attention for several years. He even advertised, interviewed, and employed additional lawyers for their expertise in areas where extra help was needed. Many of his clients use him for follow-on matters as they arise, as we have done, and will continue to do. I would not hesitate to recommend Mr. Sherman and his company.

Steve was very knowledgeable and helped my family transfer ownership of an LLC.  He was knowledgeable, patient, and his work product was exactly what we were looking for.  In addition to his legal work, Steve was also able to connect me with his network.  I highly recommend Steve and his firm.
Steven Sherman was amazing with helping my company get a resolution on a urgent matter. He made himself available when I needed attention to my legal matter. Thanks Steven!

reviews.ownerResponse: I have never heard of this reviewer nor have I ever had any dealings with him. I have no clue why he would leave any rating or review.  I know there are several lawyers named “Steven Sherman” or "Stephen Sherman" in the Bay Area. Perhaps Mr. Prom had dealings with a different lawyer with the same name?

reviews.text: I worked with the same lawyer for many years for my small business but needed to find new counsel when that lawyer retired. Steve was incredibly helpful, humble, and speedy dealing with a contract dispute issue and a few other things since. I'm delighted to have found a new partner for my business and would recommend him to anyone.

We had an outstanding experience with Dan and Matt at Law Offices of Matthew J. Quinlan attorney. From start to finish with our personal injury case involving a minor, they were not only incredibly professional, but also consistently polite and persistent in pressing the right issues. Their depth of experience was evident every step of the way, and we always felt like a priority. We recommend them for anyone seeking a reliable and effective advocate.

A family member recently experienced a dog-bite injury. Dan guided us through the entire process from understanding the terms of accepting a settlement to resolving the subsequent subrogation lien with our insurance. I highly recommend their services as not only were they extremly patient with our questions while navigating the difficult situation, but also communicated our options swiftly and with high-detail. Additionally, the cost for their services were extraordinarily
fair. If you are in search for a personal injury lawyer, I would highly recommend Matt and Dan.

It’s one of those things you don’t go through life expecting, so having Matt and Dan’s support and expertise through my dog bite incident was invaluable. As someone who was unprepared and had never personally gone through a legal process before, my experience was positive with Dan being professional, empathetic, and extremely responsive. With my questions answered and concerns addressed, I was more or less going about normally for a year or so as they did their work thoroughly and responsibly provided me with updates. I’m very thankful to have found them and built this trusted relationship.
My experience was very positive, as I felt the law offices acted very professionally, kept me informed of the various stages, and always with my best interests at heart.

Matt and Dan are phenomenal attorneys! They went above and beyond for my bike-car accident case, which was far from a guaranteed win, and thanks to their expertise and dedication, we won. Throughout the entire process, I felt truly validated, cared for, and respected. They are excellent communicators and made everything as smooth as possible. I hope I never get hit by a car again, but if I do, I’ll 100% turn to Matt and Dan. 11/10 experience working with them.

I highly recommend Dan and Matt from the Law Office of Matthew J Quinlan. I had never had a personal injury case before and they were excellent explaining the legality of my case and staying in communication. The thing I most appreciated about them is that they cared about my injury and were willing to stand up for me. They’re professional, honest, and great to trust with your legal needs.

Matthew and Dan have handled three motorcycle accident cases for me, and each result surpassed my expectations. They’re both highly experienced attorneys—professional, personable, and impressively efficient as a team.

I cannot thank Dan and Matthew enough for their exceptional handling of my dog bite case. From the very beginning, they demonstrated a high level of professionalism, expertise, and dedication. Dan and his team was always prompt in their communication, keeping me informed every step of the way and addressing all my concerns with patience and clarity.

Thanks to their skilled approach and commitment, we achieved a positive outcome that I am very satisfied with. I highly recommend Law Offices of Matthew J. Quinlan to anyone in need of legal assistance—they truly go above and beyond for their clients.

I worked with Dan and he was absolutely fantastic. He was responsive, knowledgeable, diligent, and delivered a fantastic result. I truly felt taken care of during a stressful time. I highly recommend working with Dan. I never thought I'd be writing a 5 star review for an attorney, but Dan deserves 6 stars for his work.
Honest direct
Had a talk with Aguilar today. Very helpful and straight to the point. Made contact with multiple other firms but with no useful help. I would recommend them

To anyone who is suffering from a personal injury case, I highly recommend Dan Aguilar and the Law offices of Matthew J. Quinlan. They have integrity and high knowledge of the law.

Dan is extremely experienced, professional, courteous, informative, patient, capable and caring.
He helped me with some great advice throughout my personal injury related to an auto accident and other related legal matters throughout the past few years.
He’s always been responsive, upfront and honest, a good listener with a great understanding of my case.
He genuinely cared about my well-being.

I really can’t say enough good things about Dan. If I could, I would give 10 stars review.

Thank you so much for your guidance, kindness, time and support.

I called a dozen attorneys for help with my relatively small case. None were interested. Dan/Matthew took it on and did an amazing job for me. They were in contact throughout and very professional and I am very pleased with the result their efforts yielded.

I was involved in a bike accident in July 2022 (I got "doored" and went SPLAT).  Got in touch with Dan Aguilar at the Law Offices of Matthew Quinlan, my first experience contacting a lawyer for any reason.  Not only was he easy to talk to, he was also professional, knowledgeable, and timely with information regarding my case.  In the end I wound up with much more than I thought I would and I am eternally grateful.  If you need an injury lawyer, you won't go wrong here.

Today, justice was served! Matt, thank you for taking on my case when others turned me away. You fought for me and kept me in the loop every step of the way. My car accident caused me personal trauma, major physical injuries, and left me emotionally scarred for life. I am grateful for Matt! I recommend him 100% for personal injuries and subrogation cases. Check out his YouTube channel, Law Offices of Matthew J. Quinlan. His channel is very helpful and he explains things in such a simple way. It was a long and tough fight, but we won and finally have closure, thanks to you!

There are so many lawyers in San Francisco, I am very lucky to stumble across Matt and Dan. They're very informative, professional, responsive and understood my situation better than myself. They both did an excellent job handling my case, remotely too. Plus they we're really patient to answer all of my questions, even gave me some new insights. Highly recommend for any injuries not just dog bites, thanks Matt and Dan.

Dan and Matt took my case very seriously since the beginning. I’ve called a few offices but all they did was asked me about my case and never responded. Only Dan and one other lawyer offered to help me with my case. I’m so glad I trusted my instincts and accepted help from Dan. Matt and Dan both work together on their cases so basically you’re getting help from two lawyers at the same time. Double win for me! Dan made it sooooo easy for me throughout my case and always gave me updates. Dan and Matt worked very hard to get me the most reasonable amount and I thank them very much for that. If you ever get injured,  I highly recommend you go find them first because they are truly the best! They are extremely professional and knowledgeable and most of all, they are sooooo nice!

I had a dog bite accident and came across Matthew's office online when searching for San Francisco dog bite lawyer. This happened during Covid quarantine in 2020, so I didn't get to meet Matthew in person. Dan was managing my case and I would give him 5 stars for responsiveness and professionalism. All my questions were answered, and he handled the case without much of my involvement. We were supposed to wait for about 6 months after the dog bite accident before presenting the case to the insurance company. Dan was superb at keeping me updated on the process and progress of my case. Luckily dog bite accidents don't happen often in our lives, but when they do - you need a trustworthy team to lead your case. Matthew and Dan were such team to me. Thank you guys!
Extremely happy with their service and highly recommend this firm to everyone!

i would highly recommend you if you meet some problem or lawsuit case related to personal injury. I was run over my left feet by a driver on Jan. After calling several lawyer, i choose Mattew J. Quinlan because they are the first who call me back even it is during the weekend. Also, they are very considerate and professional. During my case, they take care of everything and save me a lot of time. Thanks to their professional advice, I finally got a fair compensation.

I had such a pleasant experience with the law team here at the law offices of Mathew j Quinlan. I was in a skateboarding accident and googled something along the lines of “skateboarders rights in San Fransisco” which led me to an article with information and a link to their law office. I called the day after the initial accident and they were willing to help me from the start. Dan Aguilar was my lawyer and he is super easy to talk to and really nice as well! Dan did a very good job of putting me first and did whatever he could to make sure I was happy with the result. The communication was outstanding and I felt like I knew exactly what was going on the entire time.  This case was resolved efficiently & quickly & I am very pleased with the outcome. Thank you guys so much! If I ever get in another accident like this (which I hope not) they will be the first people I call. Thanks again :)
Matt was super helpful and i recommend his service because matt got me a maxium amount and he was also very informal about my case

I called a few other places to resolve my accident. They were nothing more than helpful from the beginning. I had owed several thousands for my medical. They listened very carefully to understand my situation and instructed me with every step of the way. At the end, I was not just only able to pay off my debt but also I was able to walk away with extra cash. Once again, thank you so much for your amazing work.
Matt worked hard for my family & me. He’s a talented lawyer & a man of his word.

My entire experience with Matt Quinlan's firm has been amazing. I first contacted Matt after being involved in an electric bike accident. While i was was still recovering from a near death experience in the hospital, I was contacted by the insurance company for the other motorist demanding almost $15,000 dollars from me.
I immediately contacted 3 different attorneys offices, but none of them would take my case due to the difficulty of winning a case like mine (no cameras at the accident site, a police report stating i was at fault).

That's when I found Matt Quinlan through google reviews. I contacted Matt through his website which was super easy to do at around 10:00pm. Matt literally answered 5 minutes later via email asking for more information. I was so surprised and shocked that someone would answer me at 10pm.

The next day, Matt called me like he said he would, and explained to me the difficulty of the situation I was in. But to my absolute surprise, he took the case anyways. Weeks of anxiety and worry immediately went out the window and there was peace of mind knowing that I had an attorney that genuinely cared about his clients.

After Matt had accepted the case, he put me in contact with one of his attorney's, Dan Aguilar. Dan has been absolutely great. I am a super needy and anxious person (even more so after the accident), and everyday for weeks i have probably called at least once or twice.
Dan has answered his phone or called me back promptly EVERY. SINGLE.TIME. He made the entire process incredibly stress-free and kept me informed at all times. He has stayed in constant contact with all involved parties to come to the best outcome for me.

after almost two months, Matt and Dan have turned my case around from an impossible situation to a Huge success.

Dan has gone above and beyond his duties by constantly keeping me updated with the status of the case, keeping my best interests in mind, and by making me feel valued and important instead of just a walking dollar sign.

The best (and hopefully last) experience i have every had with a major injury. I highly recommend the Law offices of Matthew J. Quinlan
Matthew is very competent, very responsive and gets back to you.  Let's you know the process and keeps you in the loop.  Highly recommend him.

Following a very horrific accident on a Family Vacation to San Francisco from Canada I connected with Matt to see what my options were. He was very kind and professional, and took the time to get all the necessary information that he needed to give me my best options. I've never had to work with lawyers in the past for anything other than basic documentation processing so I didn't really know what to expect. But I've heard such horror stories when trying to navigate through the legal system, especially one that isn't even a country I live in. I retained Christopher Morales to represent my 20-year-old son in a criminal case while he was still in custody. Because my son asked me to help him understand his options, I reached out to counsel seeking clarification about a plea offer that had been presented and a Young Adult Program that was described as the recommended resolution.
Unfortunately, the program and the implications of the plea were never clearly explained. Instead, program materials were emailed without much discussion. When I followed up with questions so my son could better understand the decision he was being asked to make, the interaction became adversarial.
During the conversation I was told that I was interfering with the attorney-client relationship, even though I had not attended court hearings and was only asking questions at my son’s request so he could make an informed decision. The tone of the conversation became hostile and included accusations that I found both surprising and unnecessary.
Criminal cases are incredibly stressful for families, especially when a young person is facing serious charges. In those situations, clear and respectful communication is extremely important. Unfortunately, that was not my experience here.
I would strongly encourage anyone considering this firm to have a very clear conversation at the outset about communication expectations and how questions will be handled.

reviews.text:
READ THIS REVIEW! I have no Ill feeling toward Chris his consultation was great it gave me a new line of hope when all else was hopeless so for that I am grateful. I was in a place ready to throw in the towel but I had renewed faith after the consult.. (this may not apply to everyone but if you have a high profile case continue reading)..

That being said I think I and/or the family could have been guided so much more efficiently. There were many questions left un answered, additionally I feel his communication with my husband as a client wasn’t as thorough as it could have been.

There was definitely a feeling of “take the plea so I can get an easy way out” get paid without any research, additional outlets of references or a trial. Many many things unexplained and very rushed no options.. pre trial was treated as “unimportant” when in fact later on I learned through a different lawyer, that it was.. he was late to court dates.. he scheduled the trial very very early on the calendar, when he was given the opportunity to schedule it further out.

Given the complicity of the case, this would have given him more time for preparation for trial, which if a client in the same position knows how important time is for a complicated case they would understand.

Not only that but I basically pleaded him for any other options and was told he didn’t have anymore time to discuss after 15 min and that if my husband didn’t take the plea he would die in prison then I was left in a room crying my eyes out. I would describe it as very cold and almost heartless..

He actually asked for us to pay a remaining balance beforehand as if there were something anticipated that I wasn’t aware of, and sure enough there was.

This review is not to bring any malice toward his practice it is only to give any future clients perspective. If you look at most reviews they are about consultation, so I would say you will save time and money exploring as many options as you can even if you are desperate even if you have little hope, DO NOT SETTLE..DO YOUR RESEARCH, because it may cost you money and time that can potentially make or break your case. Do not hire someone who shows you gold only to deliver sterling silver.. I hope this review helps others. Sincerest Regards, Sophia

reviews.text: Chris is a pleasure to work with, very knowledgeable and a pro.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Ryan, always a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: Worst lawyer ever,  he was even racist.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Maria, I don't recognize your name, I don't believe I know you.

reviews.text: Law firm didn't communicate with me when the court change court date BECAUSE HE WAS ON "VACATIONS"
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Kevin, I'm surprised at your comments, in light of the fact that I got your case completely dismissed on the day of trial.

reviews.text: Chris Morales is the BEST criminal law attorney in the Bay Area! He has so much knowledge and experience in what he does. He's worked with us on 2 separate occasions at has successfully won our cases with successful outcomes on both. Chris has a winning record! It is not easy to clear a record with felonies on it and Chris was able to do just that for us to help us with our immigration efforts. We can't thank him enough for all his work, dedication, communication and guidance in every step of the way. Thank you Chris for everything!
reviews.ownerResponse: Lucia, it was great working with you.

reviews.text: Chris was very helpful and we really appreciate his guidance and knowledge. We will recommend him to everyone we know.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Aly.
Thank you

reviews.text: I called but didn't receive a response
reviews.ownerResponse: Jose, I didn't receive a call from you.

reviews.text: Chris Morales is an outstanding attorney. He helped me understand everything going on and all of my options at the time. I was more then happy with the results of his actions and wouldn’t hesitate to call him again if I ever needed him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Sebastian

reviews.text: I was referred to Daniel by a friend; he and his staff went above and beyond to help me through the process. Daniel was respectful and explained everything in a way I was able to understand. Because of Daniel and his staff's dedication to helping people in my position, I was able to get a satisfactory settlement and gained a newfound respect for myself.

I recently had my initial consultation with Mr. Feder, and I can state with confidence that he is the most capable, experienced,  and dedicated employment attorney I have had the opportunity to speak with. Unlike other attorneys I consulted with, Mr. Feder took the time to review my case thoroughly prior to our meeting and specifically requested that it be conducted via Zoom to ensure effective and meaningful communication.

During our discussion, he demonstrated exceptional professionalism, deep knowledge of employment law, and a genuine concern for my situation. His insights were thoughtful and highly valuable, and the conversation was both productive and reassuring. Following our initial meeting, Mr. Feder scheduled a second Zoom session to continue preparing me for the next steps in the case.

Mr. Feder's depth of experience and strategic approach gave me great confidence that my matter is in highly capable hands. Anyone who had any employment cases would be so lucky to have Mr. Feder representing you!

I was very fortunate to encounter and work with Daniel Feder and his team. Extremely professional but also fully dedicated to stand up for my well deserved rights. When looking for a firm and our initial conversation he made me feel safe and that I was not wrong in feeling discriminated in the work place, etc. The Law Offices of Daniel Feder will always believe in their clients, cases and stand up for what is justifiably right.

I cannot express enough gratitude to Attorney Daniel Feder and his team for their outstanding work on my case. This was a wrongful termination matter that spanned nearly four years—from April 2020, to December 2024. Throughout this long and challenging journey, Daniel and his team demonstrated unwavering dedication, professionalism, and exceptional attention to detail.

Dan guided me through every step of the legal process, consistently checking in to ensure I felt informed, supported, and reassured. His expertise in wrongful termination cases and deep understanding of employment law were evident from the start. Most importantly, he took the time to truly listen, which meant a great deal to me during such a difficult time.

Despite the emotional toll the case took on me, Dan never wavered. He remained steadfast under pressure and delivered powerful results. If you are looking for a top-tier attorney who is sharp, reliable, and unshakable, Daniel Feder is the one you want in your corner.

In addition to his legal acumen, Dan is personable, engaging, and incredibly responsive. From our first meeting, I felt completely at ease with him. He was patient and generous with his time, always ensuring my questions were fully answered.

Dan’s extensive experience as an employment attorney was especially evident in his early assessment of my employment contract. He clearly has deep knowledge of employee rights under a range of state labor laws.

It was truly a pleasure working with Attorney Daniel Feder, and I am deeply satisfied with the outcome of my case. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of an employment lawyer.

Daniel Feder  is  knowledgeable, respectful, intuitive and professional and he treats clients with patience, care, understanding, and with professionalism - he is naturally relate-able, understanding and comfortable to work with

I had a few conversations with Daniel Feder and his assistant over the past few weeks as I was searching for representation against my former employer. While this firm is generally responsive via email (unlike some law firms), I found a few things about my interactions with them that were particularly off-putting:

- The general organization was poor. They asked me to submit my documentation in chunks over time instead of all at once, unlike any other law firm that I have interacted with so far. They did not always store the documents I submitted into my file.

- When I met with Feder most recently, he had not looked at my recent set of documentation submitted. He also confused me with a different case. We spent the entire meeting re-hashing things that were already discussed in a prior meeting. It was a total waste of time.

- Part of my case is a potential class action under a fairly new employment law (from 2022). Feder appeared totally unaware of this law. This is concerning.

- In general, Feder took a long time between interactions, and did not seem concerned about the urgency of my case. After a month, we had barely made any progress.

I am glad that I am speaking with many attorneys, as this has made me much more educated about the processes involved and what to expect. I advise others to do the same. Based on my learnings, it does not seem to me that Daniel Feder would provide the most competent representation. Thankfully, I already have a few attorney engagement proposals in hand, and will likely seek a few more before making my representation decisions. Best of luck to all those wronged by their employers seeking justice and trying to navigate this confusing system!
Mr. Feder's assistant stated that Mr. Feder doesn't handle cases like mine and referred me to an employment law office that has nothing to do with breach of contract cases.

Mr. Feder took time to review my case before our meeting. He showed his sympathy and understanding, he asked great questions. Although at the end he was not able to take my case, I feel being heard and respected, he also provided referral to me. It's absolutely pleasure speaking with him.

I am so thankful for Daniel's advice when complications arose from my request for FMLA leave. He gave me the confidence to make the right decision for me and my family! I will surely recommend him if anyone I know has employment law questions.

Yes,
My Attorney At Law, Dan Fedder,
Is a true warrior, a true leader!
He never gives up, a true attorney at Law
In every aspect. I am so great full for him and his amazing team!  I have been 20 years of International Body guard! That’s how I met him, sir.
It’s a honor to have experience in this Journey
With you.

I would highly recommend Daniel for anyone dealing with a wage or employment dispute. I consulted with several other offices before deciding to work with him because I was impressed with his experience and confidence that he could help resolve a wage dispute with my former employer. He was right! He and his assistant, Claire, were professional and friendly throughout the process, and were able to negotiate a settlement I feel very positive about.

Daniel Feder was cognitive about my case and highly competent, his knowledge of Labor Law is exceptional. Daniel has been supportive through the whole process. Daniel's office and his paralegal Claire was awesome, efficient and responsive. I highly recommend him as the most professional in this field.
I am glad I retained Daniel for my wrongful termination case. He fought for my rights and I received the settlement I deserved.  I will  refer anyone to Daniel, he is an experienced Attorney!!!!!

I got into some trouble and Daniel Feder handled the situation so perfectly with just single letter. He is the best! Very knowledgeable and easy to communicate with. Takes great care of the legal needs of my business. Highly recommended!

Daniel was beyond helpful in every way. Although I contacted him from WA and he is only licensed to practice in CA (I didn’t know this at the time!) he gave me a lot of great information to help me move forward with my case. I got a call back from a very nice lady hours after I made my request to review, and she scheduled an appt with him in less than 2 days. So far, his office and team has given me so much hope for the days to come, my only regret at this point is that I don’t live in CA.

Not often I praise an attorney, but Daniel is an exception. Even though we determined his services were not needed in my situation, he was cordial, responsive and professional. The legal profession could use many more attorneys like Daniel Feder!
Daniel he’s very good attorney and he use his knowledge and ability to find justice.

Daniel was there for us when things were darkest legally for my family and I. The impact of Daniel and his team on our lives has been undeniable and life changing. Daniel is an exceptional attorney, exceptionally brilliant. I recommend him to anyone who needs a competent and dedicated attorney, who operates with intergrity. If you ever need legal  assistance, he is your man!

This review is long overdue.

At a time when I was feeling hopeless while experiencing one of life's challenges, Daniel Feder heard me out, believed in me and together we were triumphant!

More than negotiating an agreeable settlement, Dan reinforced my sense of perseverance.

Dan was extremely informative and made the whole process as stress free as possible; from the depo to the settlement negotiations, I felt confident having him on my side.

All the best my man!!

Daniel Feder did a fantastic job for my case.  His commitment and professionalism is unmatched with any other attorneys. He is very reliable, punctual and consistent. I was pleasantly surprised how knowledgeable and proactive he was in every area of my case.  His effective style of representation helped my case a lot. He negotiated everything I wanted. I was very happy with his amazing work and would strongly recommend him to anyone!

Employment - Would gladly recommend to anyone

Daniel Feder was a beacon of hope for me at the time when I needed it most. Thank you, Daniel, for being highly responsive and helping provide me with excellent legal advice which helped resolve my issue. I had contacted several attorneys who didn’t even take the time to call me back in an acceptable time, he did. You were very generous with your time. I was able to tell he cared about me as a person and not just as a number. He took his time in our initial phone call and seemed to have a real passion for the clients he worked with. He was extremely knowledgeable about employment law. I am extremely grateful to you Daniel, and highly recommend you to any of my family, friends, professional acquaintances without reservation.

Dan represented me against The UC Regents,  During the settlement hearing he folded like a towel.  He allowed the judge to insult me and insinuate that I was lying it was humiliating.  My case went from being substantial basically down to nothing and the little that was set aside for me Dan took a large portion even though his share was already considerably larger.  The Judge actually encouraged him to do so.  The Judge and Dan let me know that justice is only for people of a certain race and that nobody on a jury would side with me.  That was my experience. In retrospect I should  have went with a larger firm.
Daniel Feder is a wonderful lawyer with tremendous integrity that brings results! I am so thankful to have found a lawyer that works hard in pursuit of justice for his clients!
Daniel, and all of his office staff, were extremely positive and so easy to speak with...

Dan's firm handled a rather complex employment lawsuit for me that was recently resolved to my utter satisfaction.  The achieved resolution was the result of Dan's insightful analysis of the complexities of the case at the outset, which resulted in a well-crafted strategy.

Early on, Dan involved his associate, Claire Cochran, who proved to be an excellent advocate, expertly implementing Dan's strategic framework while also countering the actions of opposing counsel deftly and effectively.  This was a long case with a lot of rancor.  Dan and Claire were phenomenally calm and professional, all the while keeping me informed and included in the process.

I had the opportunity to work with both Dan and Claire in depositions and found both to be excellent at their craft.  Ultimately, my case went to mediation.  Dan handled the mediation and I am convinced his experience and skills were instrumental in the favorable outcome of the mediation process and lawsuit.

I highly recommend the Law Offices of Daniel Feder.

I never appreciated how true those attorney’s commercials about needing someone to fight for you are - Until it happened to me.   I know that sounds cliché, but standing up when you’ve been wronged is overwhelming.  You quickly realize you need help - you need someone to stand up for you.   If you find yourself in that position – I highly recommend Daniel Feder.  He and his staff are wonderful.

Daniel explained the entire system to me, taking the mystery out of it.   Once things started - He communicated with me through entire process and fought hard for me.  I would rather not have gone through this experience, but I’m so glad that I found Daniel Feder.   His passion and determination to fight for the little guy is simply amazing.  And as glad as I am to have this behind me, I will miss my conversations with him.

If you are overwhelmed and feel powerless – reach out to Daniel Feder.

Attorney Feder and his professional team made me feel worlds better about my horrible workplace experience. He knows his stuff and will provide you with the honest feedback you need most to move forward. Thanks, Attorney Feder. I'm still frustrated and annoyed, just not nearly as much as I was before I spoke with you.

Dan is successful and well-respected because he always does what he says that he will do. He is very articulate and intelligent, which ensures his effectiveness. Without any reservations, I highly recommend Dan.

I contacted Dan when I was having problems with my employer, i.e. they were making it very difficult for me to transition to a new employment position, as well as, withholding my pay.  When I contacted Dan, he was patient, considerate and compassionate to my stressful situation.  He acted immediately and I got the results that I wanted.  He was able to negotiate a compromise with my previous employers as well as get me paid!  Dan is a top-notch attorney - he cares about your situation and takes swift and aggressive action to get positive results.  I will definitely use his services or recommend any of my friends or acquaintances to him if they have any employment-related issues.

I was referred to The Law Offices of Daniel Feder by my father.  I wasn't sure if I had a case and just wanted a lawyer to hear what happened and give me their opinion.  I called Daniel Feder's law office and scheduled a consultation.  I met with Dan and Winter.  They were both utter professionals, listened to my grievance and gave me their honest opinions.  They assured me I had a case, answered my questions, went over what happens next once they take the case and worked diligently throughout.
There were many times during my case that I was uncomfortable or felt bullied by the opposing side and it was in those times that Dan and Winter were in my corner giving me support and strength.  Winter was always there to answer my questions and was very detail oriented.  Dan on the other hand, was very knowledgeable, very kind and has a very gentle way about him. They met with me on many occasions to go over my case, update me on the status and always made sure to return my calls.
It was such a relief when my case was over but I was honestly sad to know I wasn't going to see Dan or Winter anymore.  They had become my friends after all the time we spent together.  I will never forget their kindness, compassion and professionalism and would highly recommend their services to anyone looking for representation regarding employment law and discrimination.
Thanks again Dan and Winter for all your help, support, knowledge and expertise.  You both were amazing!

I don’t typically write reviews, but I have to say that Dan Feder is the BEST employment attorney I’ve known.  He is extremely helpful, kind, knowledgeable, understanding (and not pretentious in any way).  I have retained and consulted with Dan and he has given me excellent advice.  I’m grateful for his services.  I strongly recommend him to anyone who needs representation for an employment case.

Daniel Feder is a colleague whom I have been fortunate to know both personally and professionally for twenty years.  Although ten years have elapsed since I directly supported his legal practice as a paralegal, I still recommend him to friends and business acquaintances without any hesitation for consultations when there are complex legal employee and commercial issues requiring highly confidential analysis and expertise.

Dan possesses a highly technical mindset with strong business acumen, focused on results, and is an excellent team builder. His casual demeanor belies his experience partnering with multiple business perspectives and technical stakeholders, working with a cross-functional approach in a dynamic environment, and delivering legal briefs on-time and on-budget.

He is a tireless advocate for the disenfranchised with a keen sense of humor. His interactions with those around him make one feel important and valued, with meaningful, often profound and thought provoking analysis of your case and a realistic likelihood of a successful outcome. He does not pander to potential customers as a typical plaintiff’s attorney just to get your business – in fact he would be the first to actually represent your case may not be as strong as one might surmise. He is compassionate, generous, and shares his zest for life and knowledge with others without any agenda or preconceived notion. In essence Daniel is the epitome of what the “everyman” attorney should be. I heartily recommend Daniel in every sense of the word.

Daniel is a very honest, trustworthy and professional attorney.  His experience and knowledge of the law is unmatched. He is 100% committed to every client and every case.
I would recommend Daniel without hesitation to anyone in need of a lawyer.  He never stops fighting for his clients. It is a true pleasure to work with Daniel and his staff.

Daniel Feder could practice employment law in his sleep.

Thankfully he doesn't and he takes careful time with his clients to listen to their claims and explain the strengths and weaknesses in their cases while providing an empathetic ear.

His skill in this field is enough to set him apart, but his kindness and confidence truly set him a step above the rest.

Daniel Feder, Esq. is one of the best employment attorneys in the San Francisco Bay Area.  I have known Daniel for about a decade, and in that span of time, I have referred several friends and acquaintances to him.  In every case, Daniel has demonstrated the highest level of competence, professionalism, integrity, and advocacy for his clients.  He is one of the smartest, most compassionate and tenacious men I know.  When he is on your side, you can rest assured that he will champion your cause and obtain the best legal and financial result possible.  I have known Daniel to take on corporate giants who can afford to hire very expensive lawyers to represent the corporation.  Like David slaying Goliath, Daniel has an inner confidence and intelligence where he can find a way to win for his clients, despite the seemingly overwhelming odds.  Daniel’s many years of employment law experience, his courage and confidence to take on giant corporations, his hardworking character and ability to adapt to any situation, all make Daniel Feder one of the best employment attorneys in the Bay Area.  I wholeheartedly recommend him for your employment law case!

Daniel is an incredibly intelligent lawyer.  He is not afraid to go to the mat for his clients, and I am utterly confident that he will do a fantastic job for anyone that retains him to assist them with a dispute.

Dan represented me after I was wrongfully discharged from my long-term job because I took a protected leave to care for my ill mother. The employer violated my rights to take medical leave under the California Family Rights Act. The defendants played hardball, and tried to intimidate us. Daniel was not deterred at all. He stood up to them at every stage. By the end of the case, the employer and its attorneys were the ones who were intimidated. They feared Daniel and paid dearly to settle my claims. Daniel is a top-notch plaintiff's employment attorney who represents employees in San Francisco, Alameda, San Jose, Marin, Contra Costa and San Mateo. Soon after I retained Daniel, I watched him at a boxing competition at the Third Street Gym in San Francisco. Dan was one of the heavy weights, and came out toward the end of the competition to fight a frighteningly larger opponent. Suddenly, I began to see this match as a metaphor for what I was up against in my employment discrimination lawsuit against a formidable team of corporate lawyers. Suffice it to say, Dan KNOCKED 'EM OUT IN THE FIRST ROUND and that is exactly the kind of David and Goliath situation one finds oneself in when standing up to abusive employers. Dan is definitely the employment attorney who can outsmart, outfox, and knock out the competition, no matter how formidable they might appear, who can give you the strength to keep fighting when you are scared and may think there is nothing left to live for. He works hard, is patient, and does not give up. He listens to you, respects you, and makes you believe in yourself again. I would very highly and without any qualification recommend him to any employee seeking representation against a former employer in a discrimination, harassment, wage and hour, or leave case.

Dan is a smart, experienced and trustworthy litigator.  He diligently pursues the cases and delivers the best result for his clients, particularly those are wrongly treated by large companies.

I admire Dan’s determination and commitment to seek justice for his clients. His unparalleled knowledge and experience make him the best attorney anyone needing assistance in employment law or personal injury areas.

I would refer Dan without hesitation.

I have known attorney Daniel Feder for several years now.  I have referred several friends to Daniel now, as I know they will be in good hands.  Daniel is a very intelligent, dedicated an knowledgeable attorney.  He really gets to know his clients and cares about them.  He is very compassionate in his approach to clients.  Daniel is a very likable person, but he can also be really tough and aggressive when needed  He's very well known as the top employment attorney in San Francisco.  He's an expert in this area of the law. I've been informed that business owners really respect him and that their respect for him factors into their analysis of cases.  I would recommend Daniel to any of my clients or friends who have issues with their employers and think they might have a case. Daniel is an excellent attorney!
reviews.authorName: Mia Takami, Founder of Mia Takami Real Estate Group

reviews.text: Dan is an excellent litigator.  He passionately advocates for each of his clients. He won't settle a case for anything less than top dollar.  Dan has a unique approach to law and litigation. His expertise in employment law is expansive. I was recently in trial with Dan, and his courtroom skills are impressive. His courtroom demeanor is effective with the jury, judge and in the questioning of witnesses. He is well-prepared and confident. I highly recommend him and refer clients to him regularly without reservation.

Mr. Feder is an outstanding lawyer. People say the only good lawyer is your lawyer. I disagree. I would respect Mr. Feder from either side of the argument. Mr. Feder is an aggressive lawyer who will work hard for his client. But he balances his aggressive nature with respect for people on all sides of the argument.

This is demonstrated as Mr. Feder works to help his client achieve success, but also actively works to tone down tempers and give good suggestions about being a reasonable person. By the time you need a lawyer to get involved in a dispute, your temper will be hot and your words will be sharp. This lawyer knows how to soften your weapons and use his own in a way unlike a butcher, and more like a surgeon.

If you want a man who will champion your cause, Dan is the man.

I’ve been a client of Jeffrey Greenberg for over 30 years, and there’s no one else I’d trust with my legal matters—especially when it comes to workers’ compensation. Jeffrey and his team helped me successfully reach a settlement for my work-related injuries, and the process was handled with the utmost professionalism from start to finish.

His staff is not only knowledgeable, but also incredibly helpful and attentive. Every question I had was answered with patience and care, and I always felt supported throughout the entire journey. It’s rare to find a legal team that combines experience, empathy, and efficiency the way this office does.

If you’re looking for someone who truly has your back, Jeffrey Greenberg is the one to call.
Mr Greenberg went beyond for my case. I highly recommend him for worker compensation cases. He made me happy

So my mom was using him as an attorney for a workman’s comp case and I signed some paperwork for her in 2023 to reopen her case I think ! My mom passed away July 2024 and there is a final death settlement this month and I found out Jeffery didn’t put me on it , only my 4 siblings ! No matter what one or two of my siblings said to him about my past and false accusations he should have been more professional and put me on it !! So I had to go through all this shit and put myself on it without an attorney as he refused to add  me on it , saying BS about my siblings were dependant financially on my mom which they were not !! As a matter of fact two of my brothers didn’t talk to her one for three months and the other almost two years !! This guy should have separated personal shit with my siblings and should have been more professional and added me on !  Must just be about how much more money would have went into his pocket
Best regards
Really nice until it's time to get your settlement and you aren't happy then attitudes change
Still waiting
Freindly n helpful
Attentive, Smart staff & associates and Funny !
Fantastic

Mr. Darsky is a phenomenal attorney. From the very first consultation, he was very knowledgeable, responsive, and incredibly thorough. He took the time to clearly explain my rights and options, making a stressful situation feel much more manageable. He took our case when other law offices didn’t and worked diligently to get the case settled. Throughout the process, he was strategic, detail-oriented, and always prepared. Communication was excellent, my questions were answered promptly, and I was kept informed every step of the way. What stood out most was his approach and genuine commitment to achieving the best possible outcome. He gets things done.
Thanks to his expertise and advocacy, my case was resolved efficiently and successfully. If you’re looking for a good tenant lawyer who is skilled, reliable, and truly cares about their clients, I highly recommend Aaron Darsky.
Extremely sharp attorney with integrity! Answered my call and spent quite a bit of time helping me for no charge.
Professional. Gave clear, concise and easy to understand advice. Highly recommend.
Super helpful. He was clear and direct but you can tell he’s a man of the people. I would highly recommend for tenant litigation/mediation advice. Thank you Aaron!

I called Mr. Darksy for a free consultation and he was incredibly generous with his time and knowledge.  He helped clarify exactly what I was looking for and was able to point me in the right direction.  I sincerely appreciate his generosity of time and expertise.  Despite the reputation that lawyers can have, it is humbling to know that he truly cares about people and making this world a better place through providing accurate information so people can have peace of mind!!! Thanks, Mr. Darsky!!!

Amazing and generous, Aaron helped me in a pinch to help me deal with my landlord and break my lease for poor living conditions and crime in my apartment complex. Can't say enough kind things for his services.

Thank you sir and keep it up!

Really appreciate Aaron. I called him to discuss an issue with my landlord and he provided me as much information as he could without charging me for it. Not only is he very knowledgeable, I’m grateful for him as it’s not easy to find people who want to help other people without any type of monetary gain anymore.

Throughout a complicated litigation matter that spanned 2 years and 4 months, Mr. Aaron Darsky expertly guided me through uncharted territory with confidence, calmness, patience, and perseverance.

Mr. Darsky effectively and diligently worked with co-counsels and opposing counsels.

Because Mr. Darsky orchestrated such an outstanding result, I would definitely hire him again to bring order to any legal snafu.
Very helpful, patient and kind lawyer ! Thanks for your time and help Aaron!
Aaron gave me excellent advice during a free consultation. He really cares, and gave me his full attention and help, even though I lived too far from him to hire him.

I have been extremely stressed about a tenant landlord issue that could potentially be a disaster for my health, my work, and my home of nearly two decades. The impact on my health alone thus far has been intense and I needed solid and experienced advice. I found Aaron to be clear and direct and understanding - and very helpful in setting me on the proper course to feeling more protected and prepared for dealing with potentially unethical owner and property management behavior driven by "profits over people" values. Laws can be complicated and good tenant lawyers are not easy to find. Tenants are often at a major disadvantage in dealing with experienced and legally manipulative owner representatives, so if you are a tenant facing such issues, be proactive and seek the advice of experienced lawyers such as Mr. Darsky.

I called Mr. Darsky and he answered my questions truthfully and honestly. Not knowing what to do when you are feeling taken advantage and having someone knowledgeable on your side makes all the difference. I would recommend calling him even if you are unsure of your situation. He can guide you in the right direction. Thank you Aaron
Dump

Called Aaron after dealing with a difficult landlord sending a no fault eviction and not making necessary repairs. Very glad I did. Aaron was very helpful and knowledgeable on tenant law in San Francisco and gave me an immediate consult laying out all my legal options and practical advice. Greatly appreciated the help

After dealing with a terrible landlord in the Bay Area, I decided to get help and found Aaron by just googling  “tenant lawyers” online. I gave him a call and am SO glad I did. He is extremely knowledgeable about tenant rights and provided me with the exact information I needed on how to move forward. He is so patient and generous with his time. I really can’t imagine what I would have done without him! If you are on the fence, definitely give him a call. You will be so happy you did!
Had a phone conversation where Aaron was very attentive, answered every question I had, offered options I was not even aware of. Can not recommend highly enough! If only I could leave TEN stars!

Excellent attorney and should be the first one you call. Tenant attorneys in San Francisco are very busy due to the pandemic and evictions but Aaron was wonderfully helpful and patient on our call. He spoke respectfully and was the first attorney I talked to who actually heard what I was saying. Highly recommended!
Very knowledgeable representing tenants, and honest, great person!

Aaron and Josh were great. He answered all our questions and was there every step of the way.

We got a great settlement and was very pleased after all was said and done.

If you have a rental dispute he is the best hands down.

Aaron was super helpful and attentive during a consultation hearing out my awful experience with my landlord (more like slumlord). He knows his stuff inside and out. You can tell he would go to bat for you. Dealing with these things on my own is really stressful and draining as the little guy. He is honest. He brought something to my attention that I had no idea about that will change my frustrating situation in a positive way. FINALLY GOOD NEWS. Aaron's expertise has made me feel less like a victim. Thank you!!!

If you are ever in need of a tenant attorney in the Bay area - without hesitation, I would recommend Aaron Darsky. He truly understood what I was up against and provided incredible advice in our initial call. Aaron explained every possible outcome to me with great detail and was quick to respond when I asked questions (and I asked a lot of questions). A very friendly and easy to talk to person, I cannot thank Aaron enough for his help wth my landlords.
Aaron answered all our questions patiently and thoroughly even though it was a free consultation. He is a genuine asset for tenants.

Aaron spent time with me during a free consultation to help me understand my rental agreement. He was extremely knowledgable, answered all of my questions, and helped me understand the risks involved with my agreement. I had called other lawyers that didn't get back to me, didn't answer my questions, and wasted my time. Aaron did the exact opposite.
Aaron was very helpful in going over some tenant rules with me, and was very communicative and friendly too. Thank you!
Aaron was very helpful with dealing with my landlord. After being repeatedly harassed by a greedy landlord, Aaron helped get them off our back. He replies quickly and talks a mean game.

Joseph was extremely kind and patient, he got us through a stressful time and made us feel very supported and confident despite the difficult situation we were presented with. He worked hard to get us a desirable outcome.
Joseph is an excellent personal injury attorney! Great communication, professional service, and a successful outcome. Highly recommend to anyone looking for strong representation.

Joseph was extremely competent in handling my case. He made a special effort to understand my situation very well and gave well-tailored recommendations. He is extremely detail-oriented and trustworthy. Highly recommend!

I had a great experience working with Bay Area Legal Ally. From the first call, they were professional, responsive, and genuinely cared about helping me. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I understood my options before moving forward.

What really stood out to me was how easy they were to work with — no unnecessary jargon or pressure, just honest advice and effective communication. You can tell they know what they’re doing and actually care about getting the best outcome for their clients.

Highly recommend this firm to anyone looking for a knowledgeable and trustworthy attorney in the Bay Area. They go above and beyond for their clients.
